Cookies Credit Card
Cookies Credit Card
10% cashback on your favourites up to INR 300 per brand per month
Unlimited 5x Reward Points on Online purchases
Enjoy vouchers worth up to INR 7,000 in a year
Apply Now
Welcome Benefits
Product
Benefits
Fees & Charges
Quick Links
Apply Now
Eat, ride, shop, watch - and get 10% back
A Card designed to suit your daily lifestyle. Host of benefits with a low monthly fee of just INR 100. Whatever your lifestyle is, this Credit Card guarantees a delightful and rewarding experience. Whether you love savouring, shopping, travelling, movies, or all, RBL Bank Cookies Credit card will help you make the most of life with tailored benefits to suit your digital first lifestyle.
Welcome Benefit
A welcome gift voucher of INR 1,000 serves as the first step in the Cookies Credit Card’s rewarding experience. Choose from Croma, Myntra, Amazon, Flipkart, and Shoppers Stop!*
*Make a transaction within 30 days of the card's issuance, to avail this benefit. Only full fee cardholders are eligible for this benefit upon paying membership fee. Voucher shall be mailed to cardholder within 60 days of the card’s issuance.
Reward Benefits*
Earn 1 Reward Point for every INR 100 spent on eligible categories.
5X Reward Points on online spends.
Make the Most of Your Points: Redeem up to INR 0.20 per point.
A Deal to Seek – 10% Cashback on Popular Brands (Zomato, Myntra, and Uber)
Start maximizing your savings today with 10% savings on your Food, Fashion and Travel spends.
Enjoy 10% cashback on Zomato, Myntra, and Uber—on top of any discounts you receive on these apps!
Max Cashback is capped at INR 900 per calendar month, with a limit of INR 300 per brand. Cashback is applicable only on transactions above INR 100. Eligible cashback will be reflected in your monthly statement. For complete details, please refer to the Terms & Conditions.
Milestone Program – You Spend, We Reward*
Unlock vouchers worth INR 1,000 & INR 5,000 on spending INR 2 lacs and 5 lacs respectively in a membership year. Vouchers from popular brands like Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra, Croma and Shoppers Stop await.
You choose voucher/s, we deliver. Your voucher/s will be delivered within 45 days from meeting the eligible spends criteria. For more details on milestone program, please refer terms and conditions.
Monthly Fee Waiver*
If you spend INR 5,000 or more in a calendar month on eligible categories, we waive your subsequent month’s membership fee of INR 100 + GST.
BookMyShow Movie Benefit
10% instant discount up to INR 300 per month on BookMyShow. Avail this benefit on the BookMyShow app/website.
Movie benefit is applicable once a month. For details refer terms and conditions .
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Did you know there's a surcharge attached to your fuel spends? For your fuel spends between INR 500 and INR 4,000, get a waiver of fuel surcharge.
Fuel surcharge reversal is done monthly, up to INR 150 per month. Surcharge reversal will reflect in your monthly statement.
*Effective October 15, 2024, Transactions made on select Merchant Category Codes (MCCs) Fuel & Auto (0032,2541,4001,5542,5541,5172) , Utilities (4900), Insurance (6300,6310), Quasi-Cash (6050,6051,4829), Railways (0066, 4011, 4112), Real Estate/Rental (6513), Education (8220,8244, 8249, 8211, 8241, 8299), Wallet/Service Providers (6540), Government Services (9400,1490, 2490, 2995, 7800, 9406, 9222, 9405, 9399, 9211, 9402, 9401, 9311, 9223), Contracted Services (1711, 1740, 0763, 1520, 0742, 1761, 1799, 1750, 1731, 1771, 0780), Miscellaneous (5960), Cash (6011, 6010) EMI (Split-N-Pay & EMI done during making transaction) and Bills2Pay will not be considered eligible for the benefit. Please refer T&C (Clause 2.12) for more details.
Bills2Pay - Cardmembers can pay various utility bills via RBL MyBank App/Internet banking channel.
Fees and Charges
This Credit Card has a monthly membership fee of INR 100 + GST
The redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards will be subject to a reward redemption fee of INR 99 + GST effective from August 15, 2022. For redemptions made in a single day, a one-time reward redemption fee will be charged.
Know about other applicable financial charges, click here

Platinum Maxima Plus Credit Card
Platinum Maxima Plus Credit Card
Upgrade your Lifestyle, amplify your Rewards!
2.8% Value Back on Grocery & Dining
2 Lounge access within every quarter
Apply Now
*T&C Apply
Welcome Benefits
Product
Benefits
Fees & Charges
Quick Links
Apply Now
Designed to elevate lifestyles of emerging affluent professionals
With an annual membership fee of INR 2,500 you can avail an array of benefits on the RBL Bank Platinum Maxima Plus Credit Card. Take maximum advantage by easily applying online today.
Welcome Benefit
Begin your Platinum Maxima Plus Credit Card Journey with 10,000 Reward Points as Welcome Benefit.
Avail the welcome benefit in two simple steps: Step 1: Swipe and use your card within 30 days of card issuance.
Step 2: Pay the annual membership fee by the payment due date.
Welcome Benefit Reward Points will be credited to your account within 60 days from the date of the Card issuance.
Reward Benefits
Earn 2 reward points for every INR 100 spent on your purchases*.
5x benefits just for you! Easily earn 10 reward points for every INR 100 when you use your card for dining, entertainment, grocery, and international purchases (Earn up to maximum 1000 Reward points per month).
Reward points earned in a given month will be credited to your account within 45 days from the purchase settlement date.
Purchases made on select categories will not be eligible for reward points. Refer Product T&C for details, Click here .
Milestone Benefits
Make purchases of INR 2 lakhs or more in a year and get 10,000 reward points # .
Make purchases of INR 3.5 lakhs or more in a year and get additional 10,000 reward points # .
Make purchases of INR 5 lakhs or more in a year and get additional 10,000 reward points # .
Milestone benefit reward points will be credited to your account within 45 days from the date of crossing the corresponding milestone benefit.
Purchases made on select categories will not be eligible for milestone benefits. Refer Product T&C for details, Click here .
Get in-depth insights into our exclusive Rewards Program. Learn how to redeem your Reward Points for air travel, hotel stays, shopping vouchers.
Visit rblrewards.rbl.bank.in
Discounts on Movie Tickets at BookMyShow
Get one complimentary movie ticket free up to INR 200 every month on the purchase of 2 or more tickets at BookMyShow.
Select RBL Bank Buy 1 Get 1 Offer under the Offers/Discounts section at the BookMyShow website or mobile app to avail this offer For detailed instructions on availing the benefits, click here .
Airport Lounge Access
Primary cardmembers will be eligible for 2 complimentary airport lounge accesses within India in a quarter if they spend INR 35,000 or more in the previous calendar quarter.
To know the complete list of lounges within India, click here .
Purchases made on select categories will not be eligible for lounge benefits. Refer Product T&C for details, click here .
Select Categories/MCCs (as defined by Visa/Mastercard/RuPay) which are excluded for Reward Points, Milestone Benefits & Lounge Benefits –
Fuel, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous, Bills2Pay, EMI conversion of retail transactions.
(This includes converting retail transactions to EMI, Split-N-Pay, EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App)
Refer Product T&C for all exclusions.
Fees and Charges
Annual membership fees of INR 2,500 + GST
Reward redemption fee of INR 99 + GST is applicable on the redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee will be levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.
Click here to know about other charges:

Apply Now
Upgrade your Lifestyle with reward & experiences!
Introducing the Icon Credit Card: Your gateway to a life of luxury and convenience. Designed to cater all your lifestyle needs, this card opens the door to exclusive benefits in travel, golf, dining, entertainment and many more.
Welcome Benefit
Get 20,000 bonus reward points as welcome benefit.
Avail the welcome benefit in two simple steps: Step 1: Swipe and use your card within 30 days of card issuance.
Step 2: Pay the annual membership fee by the payment due date.
Welcome Benefit will be credited to the Cardmember’s Account within 60 days from the date of the Card issuance.
Discounts on Movie Tickets at BookMyShow
Avail 1+1 movie ticket on BookMyShow, up to INR 200, twice a month.
Select RBL Bank Buy 1 Get 1 Offer under the Offers/Discounts section at the BookMyShow website or mobile app to avail this offer. For detailed instructions on availing the benefits, click here .
Rewards on Purchases
Avail 2 reward points for every INR 100 spent.
Get 20 reward points for every INR 100 spent on International purchases and weekend dining spends. Maximum 2,000 reward points per month each for International purchases and weekend dining spends.
Milestone Benefits
Earn 10,000 reward points on spends of INR 3 lakhs in a year.
Get an additional 15,000 reward points on spends of INR 5 lakhs in a year.
Get an additional 20,000 reward points on spends of INR 8 lakhs in a year.
Milestone benefit reward points will be credited to your account within 45 days from the date of crossing the corresponding milestone benefit.
Get in-depth insights into our exclusive Rewards Program.
Learn how to redeem your reward points for air travel, hotel stays, shopping vouchers. Visit: rblrewards.rbl.bank.in
Terms and Conditions
Airport Lounge Access
Primary cardmembers will be eligible for 2 complimentary airport lounge accesses within India in a quarter if they spend INR 35,000 or more in the previous calendar quarter.
Avail access to 1,400+ international airport lounges using your RBL Bank Icon Credit Card. Each visit will be chargeable, up to $35 per person. Use your primary Icon Credit Card to access the Airport Lounges outside India.
To know the complete list of lounges within India, click here .
Purchases made on select categories will not be eligible for lounge benefits. Refer Product T&C for details, click here .
Concierge Services
Golf Course Referral and Reservation Assistance
Car Rental and Limousine Referral and Reservation Assistance
Hotel Referral and Reservation Assistance
Business Services
Special Events and Performance Assistance
Spa, Fitness Centre, and Sports Centre Information and Referral Assistance
Dining Referral and Reservation Assistance
Flower and Gift Delivery Assistance
For any kind of booking, please ask for the Concierge Desk by calling our Customer Services at 022 6232 7777 .
Golf Benefits
Get access to select golf courses across the country.
Enjoy complimentary golf rounds and a discount on green fees.
Score more hole-in-one and sharpen your skills with free golf lessons.
Golf courses list and latest offers, click here .
For booking in advance, please ask for the Golf Concierge Desk by calling our Customer Service at 022 6232 7777 .
Golf Concierge complimentary only for MasterCard holders.
Entertainment Benefits
Get high on life. Your Icon Credit Card treats you like a king and queen. Enjoy unique perks especially curated for you to enjoy a luxury lifestyle.
Avail access to global iconic events like Formula 1 races, special awards nights, and other exclusive sports events.
For any kind of booking, please ask for the Concierge Desk by calling our Customer Services at 022 6232 7777 .
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Enjoy 1% fuel surcharge waiver across all fuel stations.
Valid for fuel transactions between INR 500 and INR 4,000. Maximum waiver of INR 200 per month.
Benefit will be reflected in your monthly credit card statement.
Fees and Charges
Annual Membership Fee: INR 5,000 + GST
Reward redemption fee of INR 99 + GST is applicable on the redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee will be levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.

Shoprite Credit Card
Shoprite Credit Card
Get 5% Value Back on Groceries
Enjoy 10% discount on movies tickets at BookMyShow
Earn Rewards worth 14X your Annual Fee
Apply Now
Welcome Benefits
Product
Benefits
Fees & Charges
Calculate Your Savings
Quick Links
Apply Now
Your Everyday Rewards Partner
Your Everyday Companion: A Credit Card designed to elevate your lifestyle and shopping experience. Avail a host of benefits at an annual membership fee of INR 500.
Welcome Benefit
Begin your Shoprite Credit Card journey with 2,000 reward points.
Avail the welcome benefit in two simple steps: Swipe and use your card within 30 days of card issuance.
Pay the annual membership fee by the payment due date.
Welcome Benefit will be credited to your account within 60 days from the date of the Card issuance.
Redeem your reward points at rblrewards.rbl.bank.in . For more details, refer to rblrewards.rbl.bank.in/tnc .
Reward Benefits
Earn 20 reward points for every INR 100 spent on Grocery shopping. Avail a maximum of 1,000 reward points per month.
Earn 1 reward point for every INR 100 spent on other purchases*.
Reward points earned in a given month will be credited to your account within 45 days from the purchase settlement date.
Redeem your reward points at rblrewards.rbl.bank.in . For more details, refer to rblrewards.rbl.bank.in/tnc .
5% Value Back on Grocery shopping is considered with each reward point redeemable for upto INR 0.25.
Discount on Movie Tickets at BookMyShow
Get a 10% discount (up to INR 100) on movie tickets on BookMyShow 15 times a calendar year.
Avail the offer by selecting RBL Bank 10% offer under Credit Card offers and discounts, after your movie selection on BookMyShow. For detailed instructions on availing the benefits, click here .
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Tank up with Shoprite Credit Card & get a waiver of the fuel surcharge at all fuel stations.
Valid for fuel purchases ranging from INR 500 to INR 4,000. Maximum monthly waiver of INR 100.
Benefit will be reflected in your monthly credit card statement.
Spend Based Annual Fee Waiver
Avail annual fee waiver # by making purchases worth INR 1.5 lakhs or more in a membership year.
Other Details
Shoprite Credit Card is available on MasterCard, VISA & RuPay network.
For Credit Cards issued on RuPay network, enjoy the features of National Common Mobility Card (NCMC) and RuPay Credit Card on Unified Payment Interface (UPI). Know More .
In case of RuPay Credit Card, Cardmember will earn reward points as defined in respective product terms & conditions. However, offline UPI transactions under INR 2000 done at small merchants on RBL Bank RuPay Credit Card will not be eligible for rewards points, voucher benefits, milestone benefits or any other product benefits, unless stated otherwise. For clarity, small merchants in this case means merchants with turnover of not more than INR 20 lakh during the previous financial year.
*Purchases made on select merchant categories: Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Wallet/Service Providers & Miscellaneous do not earn reward points.
W.e.f. October 15, 2024, purchases made on select merchant categories: Quasi-Cash, Education, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash & Bills2Pay will also not earn reward points.
# W.e.f. October 15, 2024, waiver of annual fees on achieving the annual spends will not include purchases made on select merchant categories: Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous & Bills2Pay and EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App), fees (if any), charges & GST.
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per Mastercard/RuPay/VISA guidelines: Grocery (5411, 5422, 5441, 5451, 5499), Fuel & Auto (0032,2541,4001,5542,5541,5172), Utilities (4900), Insurance (6300,6310), Quasi-Cash (6050, 6051, 4829), Railways (0066, 4011, 4112), Real Estate/Rental (6513), Education (8220,8244, 8249, 8211, 8241, 8299), Wallet/Service Providers (6540), Government Services (9400,1490, 2490, 2995, 7800, 9406, 9222, 9405, 9399, 9211, 9402, 9401, 9311, 9223), Contracted Services (1711, 1740, 0763, 1520, 0742, 1761, 1799, 1750, 1731, 1771, 0780), Cash (6011, 6010) and Miscellaneous (5960)
Bills2Pay is a facility provided by RBL Bank where Cardmembers can pay various utility bills via RBL MyBank App/Internet banking channel
Click here for detailed terms and conditions.
Fees and Charges
Shoprite Credit Card comes with an annual membership fee of INR 500 + GST.
Reward redemption fee of INR 99 + GST is applicable on the redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee will be levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.

Monthly Treats Credit Card
A Card designed to suit your daily lifestyle. Host of benefits with a low monthly fee of just INR 100. Whatever your lifestyle is, this Credit Card guarantees a delightful and rewarding experience. Whether you love savouring, shopping, travelling, movies, or all, RBL Bank Monthly Treats Credit card will help you make the most of life with tailored benefits to suit your digital first lifestyle.
While we are no longer accepting applications for Monthly Treats Credit Card, we present Cookies Credit Card with similar benefits. Check it out HERE
Reward Benefits*
Earn 1 Reward Point for every INR 100 spent on eligible categories.
5X Reward Points on online spends.
Make the Most of Your Points: Redeem up to INR 0.20 per point.
A Deal to Seek – 10% Cashback on Popular Brands (Zomato, Myntra, and Uber)
Start maximizing your savings today with 10% savings on your Food, Fashion and Travel spends.
Enjoy 10% cashback on Zomato, Myntra, and Uber—on top of any discounts you receive on these apps!
Max cashback capped at INR 900 per calendar month, with a limit of INR 300 for each brand. Your cashbacks will reflect on your monthly statement. For more details on cashback refer terms and conditions.
Milestone Program – You Spend, We Reward*
Unlock vouchers worth INR 1,000 & INR 5,000 on spending INR 2 lacs and 5 lacs respectively in a membership year. Vouchers from popular brands like Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra, Croma and Shoppers Stop await.
You choose voucher/s, we deliver. Your voucher/s will be delivered within 45 days from meeting the eligible spends criteria. For more details on milestone program, please refer terms and conditions.
Monthly Fee Waiver*
If you spend INR 5,000 or more in a calendar month on eligible categories, we waive your subsequent month’s membership fee of INR 100 + GST.
BookMyShow Movie Benefit
10% instant discount up to INR 300 per month on BookMyShow. Avail this benefit on the BookMyShow app/website.
Movie benefit is applicable once a month. For details refer terms and conditions.
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Did you know there's a surcharge attached to your fuel spends? For your fuel spends between INR 500 and INR 4,000, get a waiver of fuel surcharge.
Fuel surcharge reversal is done monthly, up to INR 150 per month. Surcharge reversal will reflect in your monthly statement.
*Effective October 15, 2024, Transactions made on select Merchant Category Codes (MCCs) Fuel & Auto (0032,2541,4001,5542,5541,5172) , Utilities (4900), Insurance (6300,6310), Quasi-Cash (6050,6051,4829), Railways (0066, 4011, 4112), Real Estate/Rental (6513), Education (8220,8244, 8249, 8211, 8241, 8299), Wallet/Service Providers (6540), Government Services (9400,1490, 2490, 2995, 7800, 9406, 9222, 9405, 9399, 9211, 9402, 9401, 9311, 9223), Contracted Services (1711, 1740, 0763, 1520, 0742, 1761, 1799, 1750, 1731, 1771, 0780), Miscellaneous (5960), Cash (6011, 6010) EMI (Split-N-Pay & EMI done during making transaction) and Bills2Pay will not be considered eligible for the benefit. Please refer T&C (Clause 2.12) for more details.
Bills2Pay - Cardmembers can pay various utility bills via RBL MyBank App/Internet banking channel.
Fees and Charges
This Credit Card has a monthly membership fee of INR 100+GST
The redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards will be subject to a reward redemption fee of INR 99 + GST effective from August 15, 2022. For redemptions made in a single day, a one-time reward redemption fee will be charged.

World Safari Credit Card
World Safari Credit Card
0% Forex Markup on all foreign transactions
Free Travel Insurance
Lounge access within and outside India
Apply Now
*T&C Apply
Welcome Benefits
Product
Benefits
Fees & Charges
Quick Links
Apply Now
A card curated for Travel Enthusiasts!
With the RBL Bank World Safari Credit Card, you can enhance your travel experience for just INR 3,000 annual membership fee. Every deal is meant to excite the traveller and adventurer in you. Avail benefits right from the start.
Get a MakeMyTrip voucher worth INR 3,000 as a welcome gift. Travel more freely with a 0% markup on all foreign currency transactions. Earn travel points on all of your spendings, which you can then redeem to book flights and hotels.
0% Markup Fee
Spend wherever you like with the World Safari Credit Card, which charges a 0% markup on any foreign currency transactions. This translates to a 4% savings on all currency exchange transactions. Sounds like a great offer!
Credit Card You Spend You Pay
RBL Bank World Safari $100 $100
Other Credit Cards
(3.5% foreign currency markup + GST @18%)*
$100 $104.13
Welcome Benefits
A special travel encounter exclusively for you! Receive a welcome gift of MakeMyTrip voucher worth INR 3,000.
How to avail?
Just transact with your card once within 30 days of issuance and pay your membership within the first billing cycle.
Voucher will be sent to your registered email address within 60 days from card issuance.
Validity of voucher will be 120 days from the date of voucher receipt.
Click here to go through the steps to redeem and Terms & Conditions of your welcome gift.
Refer Product T&C for more details.
Product Benefits
A seasoned reward is due to a travel lover like you.
Earn 2 Reward Points for every eligible domestic retail transaction worth INR 100.
Earn 5 Reward Points for every eligible retail transaction worth INR 100 spent on Travel purchases.
On international purchases, there are no Reward Points.
Reward Points earned will be credited to the Cardmember’s account within 45 days from the settlement date of eligible retail transactions.
Visit rblrewards.rbl.bank.in to explore and use your Reward Points for a variety of purchases, including hotel stays and air travel.
Miles and Milestones
Earn 10,000 bonus reward points on spending of INR 2.5 lacs or more in a membership year.
Earn 15,000 bonus reward points on spending of INR 5 lacs or more in a membership year.
Earn voucher worth INR 10,000 on spending INR 7.5 lacs or more in a membership year from brands including Taj Experiences, Amazon, Croma, Myntra, MakeMyTrip.
Reward points earned as ‘Milestone Benefit’ will be credited to your account within 45 days from the date of crossing the corresponding ‘Milestone Benefit’.
Voucher shall be mailed to you within 45 days from the date of crossing the corresponding ‘Milestone Benefit’.
To view the instructions for redeeming your World Safari Gift Card and its Terms & Conditions, click here
Complimentary Lounge Access
Lounge Access at airports in India: Primary cardmembers will be eligible for 2 complimentary airport lounge accesses within India in a quarter if they spend INR 35,000 or more in the previous calendar quarter.
To know the complete list of lounges within India, click here .
Purchases made on select categories will not be eligible for lounge benefits. Refer Product T&C for details, click here .
Lounge Access at airports outside India: A complimentary Priority Pass membership is live on your World Safari Credit Card which unlocks access to over 1,400 international airport lounges worldwide.
As a part of the priority pass membership, you get 2 complimentary lounge visits outside India in a calendar year
Additionally, if you spend INR 50,000 or more in a calendar quarter on your credit card, the primary cardholder can avail of an extra airport lounge visit outside India
Know the complete list of Priority Pass lounges and terms of the offer, click here .
1. The spend based extra lounge visit can be accessed through a voucher issued by Lounge Key on behalf of RBL Bank.
2. Once you avail the complimentary visits, you will be charged up to $35 in case of any subsequent lounge visits.
Travel Insurance
Worry-free overseas travel privileges for you. We have you covered with complimentary Travel Insurance on World Safari Credit Card, which covers:
Personal Liability Coverage
Trip Delay
Baggage Loss
Loss of Passport
Dental Treatment
Click here for detailed Terms and Conditions
24*7 Concierge Desk
Get the best services available to you around the clock from a dedicated concierge desk. You can do the following with the desk's help:
Golf Course Referral and Reservation Assistance
Hotel Referral and Reservation Assistance
Dining Referral and Reservation Assistance
Spa, Fitness Centre, and Sports Centre Information and Referral Assistance
Please contact the Concierge Desk for bookings, by calling our Customer Service at 022 6232 7777
Golf Privileges
Discover your World Safari Credit Card's golf privileges:
Get easy access to premier golf courses across India.
Get 4 complimentary rounds of green fee in a year and one golf lesson each month.
Rejoice 50% discounted green fee beyond 4 complimentary rounds.
Click here to know more about the program, list of golf courses and term and conditions.
**Golf Concierge complimentary only for MasterCard holders.
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Enjoy 1% fuel surcharge waiver across all fuel stations.
Valid for fuel transactions between INR 500 and INR 4,000. Get a maximum waiver of INR 250 per month.
Refer Product T&C for more details.
Fees and Charges
The annual membership cost for the World Safari Credit Card is INR 3,000 + GST.
The redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards will be subject to a reward redemption fee of INR 99 + GST. For redemptions made in a single day, a one-time reward redemption fee will be charged.
To find out if any additional fees might be incurred, click here

Platinum Delight Credit Card
Platinum Delight Credit Card
Earn Rewards worth 9X your Annual Fee
Get 4,000 Reward Points as welcome benefit

Apply Now
*T&C Apply
Welcome Benefits
Product
Benefits
Fees & Charges
Quick Links
Apply Now
Get rewarded for being consistent
Unlock Delightful Rewards with every purchase! With the Platinum Delight Credit Card, experience the joy of smart and exclusive benefits, at an annual membership fee of INR 1,000.
Welcome Benefit
Begin your Platinum Delight Credit Card journey with 4,000 reward points.
Avail the welcome benefit in two simple steps: Swipe and use your card within 30 days of card issuance.
Pay the annual membership fee by the payment due date.
Welcome Benefit will be credited to your account within 60 days from the date of the Card issuance.
Redeem your reward points at rblrewards.rbl.bank.in . For more details, refer to rblrewards.rbl.bank.in/tnc .
Milestone Benefit
Earn 1,000 bonus reward points^ on swiping your card 5 times for transactions worth INR 1,000 or more in a calendar month.
Reward points earned will be credited to your account within 45 days from the date of crossing above-mentioned threshold.
Redeem your reward points at rblrewards.rbl.bank.in . For more details, refer to rblrewards.rbl.bank.in/tnc
Reward Benefits
Earn 2 reward points for every INR 100 spent on your purchases*.
Double your happiness every weekend! Earn 4 reward points for every INR 100 spent during the weekends*.
Avail a maximum of 1,000 reward points per month.
Reward points earned in a given month will be credited to your account within 45 days from the purchase settlement date.
Redeem your reward points at rblrewards.rbl.bank.in . For more details, refer to rblrewards.rbl.bank.in/tnc
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Tank up with Platinum Delight Credit Card & get a waiver of the fuel surcharge at all fuel stations.
Valid for fuel purchases ranging from INR 500 to INR 4,000. Maximum monthly waiver of INR 150.
Benefit will be reflected in your monthly credit card statement.
Spend Based Annual Fee Waiver
Avail annual fee waiver # by making purchases worth INR 2 lakhs or more in a membership year.
^W.e.f. October 15, 2024, Additional monthly bonus reward points benefit on achieving the monthly spend criteria will not be included on purchases/spends for select merchant categories: Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous & Bills2Pay.
*Purchases made on select merchant categories: Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Wallet/Service Providers & Miscellaneous do not earn reward points.
W.e.f. October 15, 2024, purchases made on select merchant categories: Quasi-Cash, Education, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash & Bills2Pay will also not earn reward points.
# W.e.f. October 15, 2024, waiver of annual fees on achieving the annual spends will not include purchases made on select merchant categories: Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous & Bills2Pay and EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App), fees (if any), charges & GST.
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per Mastercard/RuPay/VISA guidelines: Fuel & Auto (0032,2541,4001,5542,5541,5172), Utilities (4900), Insurance (6300,6310), Quasi-Cash (6050, 6051, 4829), Railways (0066, 4011, 4112), Real Estate/Rental (6513), Education (8220,8244, 8249, 8211, 8241, 8299), Wallet/Service Providers (6540), Government Services (9400,1490, 2490, 2995, 7800, 9406, 9222, 9405, 9399, 9211, 9402, 9401, 9311, 9223), Contracted Services (1711, 1740, 0763, 1520, 0742, 1761, 1799, 1750, 1731, 1771, 0780), Cash (6011, 6010) and Miscellaneous (5960)
Bills2Pay is a facility provided by RBL Bank where Cardmembers can pay various utility bills via RBL MyBank App/Internet banking channel
For detailed Terms and Conditions, click here .
Platinum Delight Credit Card comes with an annual membership fee of INR 1,000 + GST.
Reward redemption fee of INR 99 + GST is applicable on redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee is levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.

Cards
Credit Cards
Platinum Maxima Credit Card
Platinum Maxima Credit Card
Turn daily purchases into meaningful Rewards!
Get 2.7% Value Back on Grocery & Dining
Buy 1 & get 1 Movie ticket Free
*T&C Apply
Welcome Benefits
Product
Benefits
Fees & Charges
Quick Links
Smart value for everyday spends with rewards that keep growing
Platinum Maxima Credit Card is designed to meet your lifestyle needs. Get amazing benefits on food, travel, movies, groceries and many more.
Get maximum benefits with RBL Bank Platinum Maxima Credit Card for an annual membership fee of INR 2,000. Easily apply for the Credit Card online.
Welcome Benefit
Get 8,000 bonus reward points as welcome benefit.
Avail the welcome benefit in two simple steps:
Step 1: Swipe and use your card within 30 days of card issuance.
Step 2: Pay the annual membership fee by the payment due date.
Welcome Benefit Reward Points will be credited to your Account within 60 days from the date of the Card issuance.
Reward Points
5x benefits just for you! Earn 10 reward points for every INR 100 spent on Dining, Grocery, Entertainment and International purchases. (Earn up to 1,000 maximum Reward Points per month)
Earn 2 reward points for every INR 100 spent on other purchases*.
Reward points earned in a given month will be credited to your account within 45 days from the purchase settlement date.
Purchases made on select categories will not be eligible for reward points. Refer Product T&C for details, Click here .
Milestone Benefits
Make purchases of INR 2.5 lakhs or more in a year from your Credit Card and get 10,000 reward points # .
Make purchases of INR 4 lakhs or more in a year from your credit card and enjoy additional 10,000 bonus reward points # .
Milestone benefit reward points will be credited to your account within 45 days from the date of crossing the corresponding milestone benefit.
Purchases made on select categories will not be eligible for milestone benefits. Refer Product T&C for details, Click here .
Redeem your reward points at rblrewards.rbl.bank.in . For more details, refer to rblrewards.rbl.bank.in/tnc .
Discounts on Movie Tickets at BookMyShow
Get one complimentary movie ticket free up to INR 100 every month on the purchase of 2 or more tickets at BookMyShow.
Select RBL Bank Buy 1 Get 1 Offer under the Offers/Discounts section at the BookMyShow website or mobile app to avail this offer.
For detailed instructions on availing the benefits, click here .
Airport Lounge Access
Primary cardmembers will be eligible for 1 complimentary airport lounge access within India in a quarter if they spend INR 35,000 or more in the previous calendar quarter.
To know the complete list of lounges within India, click here .
Purchases made on select categories will not be eligible for lounge benefits. Refer Product T&C for details, click here .
Select Categories/MCCs (as defined by Visa/Mastercard/RuPay) which are excluded for Reward Points, Milestone Benefits & Lounge Benefits –
Fuel, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous, Bills2Pay, EMI conversion of retail transactions.
(This includes converting retail transactions to EMI, Split-N-Pay, EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App)
Refer Product T&C for all exclusions.
Fees and Charges
Annual membership fee of INR 2,000 + GST.
Reward redemption fee of INR 99+GST will be applicable on redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee will be levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.
Click here to know about other charges.

Platinum Choice Credit Card
A credit card with power of four cards in one.
Add value to all your spends with rewards like never before with Platinum Choice Credit Card. The card perfectly complements your spending habits and lifestyle, letting you enjoy high-savings on all your spends like grocery, electronics, fashion, automobile etc. coupled with best-in-class rewards and discounts.
Get 2,000 Reward points on payment of annual fee and spends of INR 2,000 made within 30 days of card issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards).
Enjoy exclusive, never seen before features
Easy Cash: Unlimited withdrawal of your available cash limit from all ATMs in India up to your billing date (Processing fee of 2.5% applicable; min INR 500 and refer MITC for more details).
Note: Terms and Conditions apply
Shop your way to rewards
Get 1 Reward Point # for every INR 100 you spend on all that you like.
Get 2X Reward Points # on all online spends (Maximum Cap: 1,000 Reward Points).
Let’s go for a long drive
Experience the freedom and power to fill your vehicle's fuel tank at any place, at absolutely no extra cost. Get a fuel surcharge waiver of up to INR 100 per month.
The Surcharge is applicable on minimum fuel transactions of INR 500 and maximum of INR 4,000.
Cinematic Rewards for the love of movies
Get 10% off on BookMyShow, up to INR 100 every month.
How to avail? All Cardmembers can avail the offer by applying under the offers/discounts section on the BookMyShow checkout page. Visit https://www.rbl.bank.in/ for details. Cardmember will need to add their Card details and expiry date for availing the offer. This offer cannot be clubbed with any other offer.

Note: Joining Bonus on 2,000 Reward Points will only be credited on payment of Joining fee and on crossing spends of INR 2,000 within 30 days of card issuance.
Note: Value of 1 Reward Point will vary from INR 0.11 to INR 0.25 across different categories on rblrewards.rbl.bank.in .
For calculation purpose, we have assumed value of 1 Reward Point = INR 0.25.
# Transactions made on Education, Insurance, Utilities, Rent Payments, Fuel and Wallet Load categories will not earn reward points.
# Effective from October 15, 2024 there are few modifications to the product Terms on your Credit Card. Transactions made on Auto, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate, Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Bills2pay, EMI, Miscellaneous & Cash are not eligible on your Platinum Choice Credit Card.
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per VISA & Mastercard guidelines:
Fuel:0032,2541,4001,5542,5541,5172; Utility:4900;Insurance:6300,6310; Quas-Cash:6050,6051,4829; Railways:0066,4011,4112; Rental:6513; Education:8220,8244,8249,8211,8241,8299; Wallet:6540; Government Services:9400,1490,2490,2995,7800,9406,9222,9405,9399,9211,9402,9401,9311,9223; ContractedServices:1711,1740,0763,1520,0742,1761,1799,1750,1731,1771,0780; Cash:6011,6010; Misc:5960; Bills2Pay:Tran Code - 71,Tran Code - 72; EMI
Own your Platinum Choice Credit Card by paying an annual fee of INR 499 (Plus Service Tax).
Spend INR 50,000 in a year and get second year annual fees of INR 499 reversed.
Reward redemption fee of INR 99 + GST is applicable on redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee is levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.

Welcome Benefits

Benefits
Fees & Charges
Quick Links
World Plus Credit Card
Experience privileges like never before with your World Plus Credit Card. Enjoy benefits on Movies and Dining, get complimentary access to major domestic airport lounge and avail our 24*7 concierge service. In addition plan your spends and earn unparalleled rewards.
Get 20,000 Reward points on payment of annual fee and spends of INR 2,000 made within 30 days of card issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards).
Enjoy exclusive, never seen before features
Easy Cash: Unlimited withdrawal of your available cash limit from all ATMs in India up to your billing date (Processing fee of 2.5% applicable; min INR 500 and refer MITC for more details).
Note: Terms and Conditions apply
Shop your way to rewards
Get 2 Reward Points per INR 100 you spend # .
Spend INR 3,00,000 in a year and get 20,000 Reward Points. Cross spend level of INR 5,00,000 in a year and get additional 20,000 Reward Points # .
Redeem them at rblrewards.rbl.bank.in for an exciting range of gift vouchers/hotel stays/air tickets etc.
Dine in Style
Avail 5% discount on your dining spends, via 20 Reward Points that you earn for every INR 100 spent (Maximum Reward Points = 2,000 per month).
Rewards on international spend
Avail 5% discount on your International spends, via 20 Reward Points that you earn for every INR 100 spent (Maximum Reward Points = 2,000 per month).
Let’s go for a long drive
Experience the freedom to fill your vehicle's fuel tank at any place, at absolutely no extra cost. Get a fuel surcharge waiver of up to INR 200 per month.
The Surcharge is applicable on minimum fuel transactions of INR 500 and maximum of INR 4,000.
A relaxing airport experience
Get 8 free* visit in a year, at domestic lounges at all major airports in India. The World Plus Credit Card knows the best ways to comfort you.
*Maximum limit of 2 complimentary airport lounge access in a quarter.
Please note: Spends of INR 35,000* (or more) made in the preceding calendar quarter will unlock the lounge access for the subsequent quarter.
*Excluding Rental spends
As a part of World Plus Credit Card benefit, you get a complimentary Priority Pass Membership. Using priority pass membership within India for airport lounge access entails a charge upto $35. Similar charges of $35 will apply in case of usage outside India.
Click here for the list of lounges and the terms and conditions of the offer. The Lounge program is offered by MasterCard/Visa.
For Golf courses bookings**, please ask for the Golf Concierge Desk by calling our Customer Services at 1800 102 6263. To know the list of Golf courses, latest offers and Terms and Conditions, Click here .
**Golf Concierge complimentary only for MasterCard holders.
World class concierge
To give you the best-in-class services, our dedicated Concierge Help Desk will assist you with all your bookings.
Kindly call Customer Service at 022-42320264 for:
Golf Course Referral and Reservation Assistance
Car Rental, Limousine Referral and Reservation Assistance
Hotel Referral and Reservation Assistance
Business Services
Special Events and Performance Assistance
Spa, Fitness Centers and Sports Centers Information and Referral Assistance
Dining Referral and Reservation Assistance
Flower and Gift Delivery Assistance
Cinematic Rewards for the love of movies
Get 1+1 free movie ticket (Up to INR 200), on BookMyShow, twice a month on any day of the week.
How to avail? All Cardmembers can avail the offer by applying under the offers/discounts section on the BookMyShow checkout page. Visit https://www.rbl.bank.in/ for details. Cardmember will need to add their Card details and expiry date for availing the offer. This offer cannot be clubbed with any other offer.

Platinum Advantage Credit Card
A Credit Card to serve your basic needs.
Add value to all your spends with rewards through Platinum Advantage Credit Card. The card complements your spending habits and lifestyle, letting you enjoy savings on your spends like movies, fuel etc.
Get 2,000 Reward points on payment of annual fee and spends of INR 2,000 made within 30 days of card issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards).
Key Benefits
Enjoy Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Annual Rewards worth INR 3,075+
Offer on Movies
Rewards on all spends
Shop your way to Rewards
Get 1 Reward Point for every INR 100 spend on all your spends #
Let’s go for a long drive
Experience the freedom and power to fill your vehicle's fuel tank at any place, at absolutely no extra cost. Get a fuel surcharge waiver of up to INR 100 per month.
The Surcharge is applicable on minimum fuel transactions of INR 500 and maximum of INR 4,000.
Cinematic Rewards for the love of movies
Get 20% off on BookMyShow, 15 times in a year upto INR 100 in each transaction.
How to avail?
All Cardmembers can avail the offer by applying under the offers/discounts section on the BookMyShow checkout page. Visit https://www.rbl.bank.in/ for details. Cardmember will need to add their Card details and expiry date for availing the offer. This offer cannot be clubbed with any other offer.

Platinum LifeEasy Credit Card
A credit card with power of four cards in one.
Plan and enjoy your benefits on Grocery, Travel and Fuel Purchases with your Platinum LifeEasy Credit Card. The card perfectly complements your spending habits and lifestyle letting you enjoy high-savings on all your Grocery, Fuel, Ola, Uber coupled with best in class milestone vouchers.
Get Gift vouchers worth INR 2,000 on payment of annual fee and spends of INR 2,000 made within 30 days of issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards).
Key Benefits
Offer on Ola/Uber Transactions
Offer on Fuel Purchases
Offer on Grocery Purchases
Attractive Milestone Vouchers
Enjoy exclusive, never seen before features
Easy Cash: Unlimited withdrawal of your available cash limit from all ATMs in India up to your billing date (Processing fee of 2.5% applicable; min INR 500 and refer MITC for more details).
Note: Terms and Conditions apply
Let’s go for a long drive
Experience the freedom and power to fill your vehicle's fuel tank at any place, at absolutely no extra cost. Get a fuel surcharge waiver of up to INR 150 per month.
The Surcharge is applicable on minimum fuel transactions of INR 500 and maximum of INR 4,000.
Accelerated Rewards for you
10% Cashback^^ on Fuel Purchases (INR 200 per month)
10% Cashback^^ on Ola/ Uber transactions (INR 200 per month)
Get 5% Cashback^^ on Grocery spends (INR 200 per month)
Get Gift vouchers worth INR 1,000 on crossing spends of INR 2,50,000 in a year #
Second year fee reversal on spend of INR 3,50,000 made in the first year #
^^ Redeem your cashback on rblrewards.rbl.bank.in
Please note: Cashback will be credited in form of reward points.
Add luxury to your travel
Get 1 free visit every quarter, at domestic lounges, at all major airports in India. The Platinum LifeEasy Credit Card knows the best ways to comfort you, so it brings all the offers right to your doorstep.
Click here for the list of lounges and the terms and conditions of the offer. The Lounge program is offered by MasterCard/Visa.
Please note: Spends of INR 35,000* (or more) made in the preceding calendar quarter will unlock the lounge access for the subsequent quarter.
*Excluding Rental spends
HOW IT ADDS UP ?
Benefits
Value (In INR)
Welcome Gift: INR 2,000 worth Gift Vouchers (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards)
2,000

Just Cinema, Entertainment & Discounts!
The RBL Bank Play Credit Card issued by "RBL Bank Ltd" in association with "BigTree Entertainment Pvt Ltd (BookMyShow)" is suited up, to give you an all-rounder of a Credit Card experience, beyond your wildest dreams. Enjoy top offers in categories you love, and never let there be a dull moment again, with PLAY!
Come Out to PLAY!
Enjoy INR 500 discount on movies, streams, events, plays, sports, activities bookings on BookMyShow app/website.
How do you get started? It’s simple!
Make a purchase with your RBL Bank Play Credit Card within 30 days of issuance.
Offer valid for 3 months!
"There is a revenue sharing arrangement between RBL Bank & BOOKMYSHOW for this card".
Important Note - Welcome benefit applicable for paid card only.
A Multitude of Benefits to Delight & Reward!
Monthly Movie Tickets
Simply spend INR 5,000^ in a billing month to get 2 free movie/stream*/ play/ events/ sports/ activities tickets up to INR 250 each.
Offer valid for 1 month
Monthly benefit is to be used in a single transaction and applicable on booking minimum two tickets. Discount value will either be INR 500 (INR 250 per ticket) or value of two tickets, whichever is lower.
The offer will be activated on next day of start of billing cycle date after 6 PM and will remain valid till end of billing cycle. Please refer https://www.rbl.bank.in/bmsoffers for detailed steps to avail the offer.
* Up to INR 500 discount on Stream category
From Cinematic, to Culinary!
Upon booking movie tickets on BookMyShow with RBL Bank Play Credit Card, get up to INR 100 off, on any food and beverage items, to elevate your cinema experience
Onroad Offers to Delight!
On fuel transactions between INR 500 and INR 4,000, get your fuel surcharge waived up to INR 100, per month!
Tap & Transit (NCMC Credit Card)
Navigate your daily commutes effortlessly at metro and bus stations by simply tapping your card, streamlining your travel experience. To view more details, click here
View FAQs
Scan and Pay (UPI wala Credit Card)
Eliminate the hassle of handling cash and enjoy a seamless payment process by using UPI where you can simply scan and pay for a smooth transaction process. To view more details, click here
View FAQs

Spend INR 1.5 Lakhs in a year to get your next year’s fee^ waived off

RBL Bank Movies and More Credit Card
RBL Bank Movies and More Credit Card
Upto INR 500 Discount on BookMyShow*
15,000 Reward Points on annual spends of INR 3.5L^
*T&C Apply
Welcome Benefits
Product
Benefits
Fees & Charges
Quick Links
Fun, Food and Cinema!
The RBL Bank Movies and More Credit Card issued by "RBL Bank Ltd" in association with "BigTree Entertainment Pvt Ltd (BookMyShow)" comes at an annual fee of INR 1,000. Please go through the page to explore the benefits that are available with the RBL Bank Movies and More Credit Card membership.
"There is a revenue sharing arrangement between RBL Bank & BOOKMYSHOW for this card".
Entertaining Beginnings!
Enjoy movies and events worth INR 1,000 on BookMyShow*.
Just 3 simple steps to earn your welcome benefit:
Download RBL Bank MyBank App
Make 1 st transaction within 30 days of card issuance
Pay your joining fee by the due date of your first statement
*The INR 1,000 discount or 4 free movie tickets (whichever is lower) can be availed in 2 transactions of upto INR 500 each with a maximum of 2 tickets per transaction. You can avail the offer by applying for the RBL Bank welcome offer under the apply offers section while initiating payment.
Important Note - Welcome benefit applicable for paid card only.
Monthly Treats
Monthly food and movie vouchers, much to your delight!
Enjoy up to 2 free movie tickets worth INR 250 each at BookMyShow on monthly spends of INR 15,000^; Please note that this offer is applicable if used in a single transaction
Enjoy 1 free movie ticket up to INR 250 at BookMyShow on monthly spends of INR 10,000^
Monthly benefit is automatically available to you at BookMyShow from next day of your bill generation and is valid till next bill generation. Example for statement date of 2 nd , the offer will be available from 3 rd till 2 nd of next month.
The offer will be activated on next day of start of billing cycle date after 6 PM and will remain valid till end of billing cycle. Please refer https://www.rbl.bank.in/bmsoffers for detailed steps to avail the offer.
Annual Rewards Bonanza
Get 5,000 bonus reward points when the annual spends on your card cross INR 2 lakhs^
Get additional 10,000 bonus reward points when the annual spends on your card cross INR 3.5 lakhs^
Explore our Rewards Program and redeem your Reward Points for air travel, hotel stays, shopping vouchers and much more at rblrewards.rbl.bank.in
Entertaining Times!
Get 10% discount on bookings at BookMyShow, for 15 times in a year, upto INR 100 per transaction
Fun times are Rewarding times
With your RBL Bank Movies and More Credit Card Rewards Membership Program, you can:
Earn 10 reward points
Earn 10 reward points/ INR 100 spent at BookMyShow and at Pizza Hut and KFC
Earn 20 reward points
Earn 20 reward points/ INR 100 spent on dining on Wednesdays
Earn 1 reward points
Earn 1 Reward point* INR 100 on all your purchases
^Purchases made on select merchant categories: Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi Cash, Railways, Real Estate / Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Miscellaneous, Bills2Pay, Cash, EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App)will not be considered in the purchase value for the monthly, annual milestone & rewards benefit. Do refer to the below MCC table for more details.
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per Mastercard, VISA & RuPAY guidelines:

Fuel Freedom
Enjoy waiver of fuel surcharge at any petrol pump in India up to INR 100 each month fuel surcharge waiver is applicable for each transaction in the range of INR 500 to INR 4,000.

Welcome Benefits
Product
Benefits
Fees & Charges
Quick Links
Watch blockbusters, dine out and earn rewards!
A world of delicious treats & blockbuster occasions awaits !
RBL Bank Blockbuster Credit Card, in association with BookMyShow, your key to a world of delightful and entertaining experiences.
This card is packed with pleasing rewards, benefits & exclusive offers to make your shopping, dining & entertaining experiences delightful.
"There is a revenue sharing arrangement between RBL Bank & BOOKMYSHOW for this card".
Blockbuster Beginnings!
Enjoy movies and events worth INR 1,000 on BookMyShow*. Adding more to your enjoyment are 8,000 reward points.
Just 3 simple steps to earn your welcome benefit:
Download RBL Bank MyBank App
Make 1 st transaction within 30 days of card issuance
Pay your joining fee by the due date of your first statement
*The INR 1,000 discount or 4 free movie tickets (whichever is lower) can be availed in 2 transactions of upto INR 500 each with a maximum of 2 tickets per transaction. You can avail the offer by applying for the RBL Bank welcome offer under the apply offers section while initiating payment.
Important Note - Welcome benefit applicable for paid card only.
Chartbuster reward program
Earn 2 Reward point^ INR 100 on all your purchases
Accelerate your enjoyment with 20 reward points per INR 100 spent on dining on weekends. A maximum of 2,000 reward points per billing cycle under the accelerated Reward Points program on dining
Spend INR 3.5 lakhs^ in a year to earn 10,000 Reward Points
Spend INR 5.0 lakhs^ in a year to earn an additional 15,000 Reward Points
^Purchases made on select merchant categories: Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi Cash, Railways, Real Estate / Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Miscellaneous, Bills2Pay, Cash, EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App)will not be considered in the purchase value for the monthly, annual milestone & rewards benefit. Do refer to the below MCC table for more details.
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per Mastercard, VISA & RuPay guidelines:
MCC Category MCC Code/Tran Code
Fuel & Auto 0032, 2541, 4001, 5542, 5541, 5172
Utilities 4900
Insurance 6300, 6310
Quasi-Cash 6050, 6051, 4829
Railways 0066, 4011, 4112
Real Estate/Rental 6513
Education 8220, 8244, 8249, 8211, 8241, 8299
Wallets/Service Providers 6540
Government Services 9400, 1490, 2490, 2995, 7800, 9406, 9222, 9405, 9399,9211, 9402, 9401, 9311,9223
Contracted Services 1711, 1740, 0763, 1520, 0742, 1761, 1799, 1750, 1731, 1771, 0780
Cash 6011, 6010
Miscellaneous 5960
Bills2Pay** NA
EMI transactions NA
**Bills2Pay is a facility provided by RBL Bank where Cardmembers can pay various utility bills via RBL MyBank App/Internet banking channel
Explore and experience our RBL Bank Rewards Programme, where you have an opportunity to redeem your Reward Points for air travel, hotel stays, mobile talk time top up, shopping vouchers and gifts ranging from electronics, mobiles, apparels and much more.
Entertaining times. Entertaining discounts.
Spend INR 20,000 every month to get 2 free tickets at BookMyShow for all events and movies*
Get 10% discount on bookings at BookMyShow, for 15 transactions in a year, up to INR 100 per transaction^
*The offer will be activated on next day of start of billing cycle date after 6 PM and will remain valid till end of billing cycle. Please refer https://www.rbl.bank.in/bmsoffers for detailed steps to avail the offer.
^Offer can be availed by applying for the ‘RBL Bank 10% Discount offer’ under the offers/discounts section on the BookMyShow website or mobile app through at checkout page.
Good times are here to stay
Airport journeys can be tiring at times, to relieve & de-stress you, your RBL Bank Blockbuster Credit Card offers you free airport lounge access
4 complimentary visits per year at domestic airport lounges
Go places without paying anything extra on fuel with your RBL Bank Blockbuster Credit Card
Get a waiver on fuel surcharge till up to INR 150 a month, for all fuel transactions between INR 500 & INR 4,000
Complimentary lounge visits are subject to one visit per quarter. Please click here to know the list of lounges and complete details of the lounge access program.
RBL Bank Blockbuster Credit Card is available on the MasterCard Network.
For detailed Terms and Conditions, click here
All these come at an annual fee of just INR 3,000 +GST.
A Reward redemption fee of INR 99 +GST will be applicable on redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee will be levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.

Unlock INR 8,000 worth of vouchers from popular brands on INR 8 lacs spent
Enjoy complimentary lounge access at 1,400+ lounges worldwide

Welcome Benefits
Product
Benefits
Fees & Charges
Quick Links
Insignia Preferred Banking Credit Card
Welcome to a unique, world-class experience with your RBL Bank Insignia Preferred Banking Credit Card. Enjoy affluence at its best with curated rewards. Best-in-class services with our dedicated 24x7 Concierge Help Desk to assist you with all your bookings. Exclusivity is redefined with hand-picked shopping experiences, golf retreats, tailored services, and lots more.
Move in the lap of luxury with 'just for you' privileges along with special benefits for your loved ones too. Go ahead! Discover the exciting experience.
Welcome Benefits
Get 28,000 bonus reward points as welcome benefit. (Not Applicable for Insignia Banking customers)
Avail the welcome benefit in two simple steps:
Step 1: Swipe and use your card within 30 days of card issuance.
Step 2: Pay the annual membership fee by the payment due date.
Welcome Benefit will be credited to the Cardmember’s Account within 60 days from the date of the Card issuance.
Refer Product T&C for more details
Curated Rewards
Every step is a rewarding experience.
You earn 5 reward points for every INR 100 spent on domestic transactions.
You earn 10 reward points for every INR 100 spent on international transactions.
Reward points will be credited to the Cardmember’s account within 45 days from the settlement date of eligible retail transactions.
Feel free to call us anytime on the Preferred Call Centre at +91 22 6232 7777 for any information regarding your Curated Rewards.
Milestone Benefit
Unlock vouchers worth INR 8,000 on your favourite brands (Amazon, Myntra, Croma, MakeMyTrip & Taj Experiences) on spends of INR 8 lacs in a membership year.
Vouchers will be credited to your account within 45 days from the date of crossing the corresponding Milestone Benefit.
Click here for the Milestone Benefit T&C.
Entertaining Affair
Avail a flat discount of INR 500 on movie tickets at BookMyShow twice a month.
The offer can be availed by selecting RBL Bank Insignia Preferred Banking and Club Concierge offer in the Offers and discounts section under Credit Cards post selection of movies at BookMyShow.
For detailed steps on how to avail the benefit, click here .
Exclusive Dining Privileges*
Enjoy 25% to 50% discount, 1+1 Buffet privileges, and priority booking powered by EazyDiner Prime at curated selection of premium restaurants.
Luxury Hotel Benefits*
Experience luxury with exclusive benefits at 2400+ premium hotels across the globe, including:
Early check-in | Late check-out | Complimentary room upgrade | Complimentary breakfast for two | Hotel or dining credit | Welcome amenity.
Our hotel partners include Marriott, Accor, IHG, Mandarin Oriental, Shangri-La and many more.
(Benefits may vary by property and are subject to change at any time. Early check-in, late check-out, complimentary room upgrade are subject to availability.)
Health and Wellness Benefits*
Get 15% discount on Wellness programs from Weljii such as Weight Management, Diabetes Care ,Healthy Heart and others.
Receive a free health score or status assessment worth INR 1,999 and avail of a 10% discount on curated packages at Dietician Support.
Get 10% discount on one-time consultation and multi-week plans from renowned nutritionist Vasundhara Agrawal.
Lounge Experiences
Lounge Access at airports in India: You can enjoy 2 complimentary lounge visits every calendar quarter at major domestic & international terminals across India by swiping your Insignia Preferred Banking Credit Card.
Know the complete list of domestic lounges and terms of the offer, click here .
Lounge Access at airports outside India: A complimentary Priority Pass membership is live on your Insignia Preferred Banking Credit Card which unlocks access to over 1,400 international airport lounges worldwide.
As a part of the membership, you get 6 complimentary lounge visits outside India in a calendar year.
Complimentary visits can be shared between the Primary cardholder and their guests.
Additionally, if you spend INR 1,00,000 or more in a calendar month on your Credit Card, the primary cardholder can avail of an extra lounge visit outside India.
Know the complete list of Priority Pass lounges and terms of the offer, click here .
1. The spend based extra lounge visit can be accessed through a voucher issued by Lounge Key on behalf of RBL Bank.
2. Once you avail the complimentary visits, you will be charged up to $35 in case of any subsequent lounge visits.
The Perfect Swing**
Tee off with a Master Stroke while revelling in golfing privileges.
Get easy access to premier golf courses across India.
Get 4 complimentary rounds of green fee in a year and one golf lesson each month.
Rejoice 50% discounted green fee beyond 4 complimentary rounds.
To book your game, please call MasterCard World Card Golf helpline at 1800 102 6263. An advance notice of 7 days will be required.
Click here to know more about the program, list of golf courses and term and conditions.
**Golf benefit is complimentary only for MasterCard holders.
World Class Concierge
Experience the exceptional benefits and assistance offered by our World Class Concierge services. Our dedicated team is ready to assist you with all your needs. For personalized services, kindly call us at +91 22 6232 7777 and ask for the concierge desk.
Car Rental and Limousine Referral and Reservation Assistance
Flower and Gift Delivery Assistance
Spa, Fitness Centre, and Sports Centre Information and Referral Assistance
Global Events and Performance Assistance & Business Services
Overseas Education Assistance
Freedom from Fuel Surcharge
Get waiver of fuel surcharge across all fuel stations
Waiver of the 1% surcharge on fuel on all transactions between INR 500 and INR 4,000.
A maximum fuel surcharge waiver up to INR 500 per month.
*For Exclusive Dining Privileges, Luxury Hotel Benefits & Health and Wellness Benefits, kindly call us at +91 22 6232 7777 and ask for the concierge desk.
Refer Product T&C for more details
Annual membership fee for the Insignia Preferred Banking Credit Card is INR 7,000 + GST.
Annual membership fee of subsequent year is waiver off on spending INR 10 lacs in a membership year.
No annual membership fee for the RBL Bank Insignia Preferred Banking Customers.
To find out if any additional fees might be incurred, click here .

Titanium Delight Credit Card
While we are no longer accepting applications for Titanium Delight Credit Card, we present Cookies Credit Card that will help you make the most of life. Whether you love movies, food, travelling, or all three, we are sure you will like our new proposition - Cookies Credit Card. Check it out HERE
Existing cardmembers of Titanium Delight Credit Card can continue enjoying all the benefits & features associated with it. Refer to Product Benefits section for the card's features.
Milestone Benefit
Make purchases of INR 1.5 lakhs or more in a membership year and get 4,000 reward points^.
Reward points earned will be credited to your account within 45 days from the date of crossing above-mentioned threshold.
Redeem your reward points at rblrewards.rbl.bank.in . For more details, refer to rblrewards.rbl.bank.in/tnc
Reward Benefits
Earn 1 reward points for every INR 100 spent on your purchases*.
Enjoy Mid-Week Delights
Earn 20 reward points for every INR 100 spent on ordering pizza from Domino's/Pizza Hut on Wednesdays. Maximum of 1,000 reward points per month.
Earn 10 reward points for every INR 100 spent on grocery shopping on Wednesdays. Maximum of 1,000 reward points per month.
Reward points earned in a given month will be credited to your account within 45 days from the purchase settlement date.
Redeem your reward points at rblrewards.rbl.bank.in . For more details, refer to rblrewards.rbl.bank.in/tnc
Discount on Movie Tickets at BookMyShow
Get 1+1 free movie ticket or discount of INR 200 (whichever is lower) on BookMyShow once a calendar month on a Wednesday.
For detailed instructions on availing the benefits, click here .
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Tank up with Titanium Delight Credit Card & get a waiver of the fuel surcharge at all fuel stations.
Valid for fuel purchases ranging from INR 500 to INR 4,000. Maximum monthly waiver of INR 100.
Benefit will be reflected in your monthly credit card statement.
Spend Based Annual Fee Waiver
Avail annual fee waiver # by making purchases worth INR 1.5 lakhs or more in a membership year.
^W.e.f. October 15, 2024, Additional bonus reward points benefit on achieving an annual spends will not be included on purchases/spends for select merchant categories: Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous, Bills2Pay and EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App), fees (if any), charges & GST.
*Purchases made on select merchant categories: Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Wallet/Service Providers & Miscellaneous do not earn reward points. W.e.f. October 15, 2024, purchases made on select merchant categories: Quasi-Cash, Education, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash & Bills2Pay will also not earn reward points.
# W.e.f. October 15, 2024, waiver of annual fees on achieving the annual spends will not include purchases made on select merchant categories: Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous & Bills2Pay and EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App), fees (if any), charges & GST.
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per Mastercard/RuPay/VISA guidelines: Grocery (5411, 5422, 5441, 5451, 5499), Fuel & Auto (0032,2541,4001,5542,5541,5172), Utilities (4900), Insurance (6300,6310), Quasi-Cash (6050, 6051, 4829), Railways (0066, 4011, 4112), Real Estate/Rental (6513), Education (8220,8244, 8249, 8211, 8241, 8299), Wallet/Service Providers (6540), Government Services (9400,1490, 2490, 2995, 7800, 9406, 9222, 9405, 9399, 9211, 9402, 9401, 9311, 9223), Contracted Services (1711, 1740, 0763, 1520, 0742, 1761, 1799, 1750, 1731, 1771, 0780), Cash (6011, 6010) and Miscellaneous (5960)
Bills2Pay is a facility provided by RBL Bank where Cardmembers can pay various utility bills via RBL MyBank App/Internet banking channel
Titanium Delight Credit Card comes with an annual membership fee of INR 750 + GST.
Reward redemption fee of INR 99 + GST is applicable on redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee is levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.

RBL Bank Bankbazaar SaveMax Credit Card
The RBL Bank BankBazaar SaveMax Credit Card issued by "RBL Bank Ltd" in association with "A&A Dukaan Financial Services Private Limited (BankBazaar)" is tasked with making every one of your spends, no matter the size or frequency, an enjoyable experience. The Card takes into account what matters most to YOU, and aims to maximize your value in those moments!
"There is a revenue sharing arrangement between RBL Bank & BANKBAZAAR for this card".
Daily Needs, Made Delightful
Get 5x reward points on all your grocery spends, make even the regular payments in life, thoroughly rewarding ones! (Up to 1,000 reward points every month)
Every Purchase Recognized & Rewarded
Thanks to our reward points scheme, every time you spend INR 100 on your SaveMax Card, you will earn 1 reward point*!
*Reward points are not accrued on the following excluded MCC/Categories Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Railways, Real Estate / Rental, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services and EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay, & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App). Additionally W.e.f. October 15, 2024, purchases made on select merchant categories: Cash, Quasi Cash, Education, Contracted Services, Miscellaneous & Bills2Pay will not be considered for base reward points accrual.
Refer list of excluded MCC/Categories as below:
Category MCC
Railways 0066, 4011, 4112
Fuel & Auto 0032, 2541, 4001, 5542, 5541, 5172
Utilities 4900
Wallet/Service Providers 6540
Quasi-Cash 6050, 6051, 4829
Real Estate/Rental 6513
Insurance 6300, 6310
Education 8220,8244, 8249, 8211, 8241, 8299
Government Services 9400,1490, 2490, 2995, 7800, 9406, 9222, 9405, 9399, 9211, 9402, 9401, 9311, 9223
Contracted Services 1711, 1740, 0763, 1520, 0742, 1761, 1799, 1750, 1731, 1771, 0780
Cash 6011, 6010
Miscellaneous 5960
Bills2Pay** NA
EMI NA
**Bills2Pay is a facility provided by RBL Bank where Cardmembers can pay various utility bills via RBL MyBank App/Internet banking channel
Benefits to Claim!
The offers that keep on giving! Earn 10% cashback on Zomato and 10% discount on BookMyShow, up to INR 100 every month, on each
Stay up-to-date, with your Credit!
Head over to BankBazaar.com to get a free credit advisory report every month, so you are always in the loop!
RBL Bank Bankbazaar SaveMax Credit Card is available on MasterCard & VISA network.

RBL Bank Bankbazaar SaveMax Pro Credit Card
The RBL Bank BankBazaar SaveMax Pro Credit Card issued by "RBL Bank Ltd" in association with "A&A Dukaan Financial Services Private Limited (BankBazaar)" offers a rewardful experience for a variety of expenses you make in your daily life. Witness the pool of benefits you can avail with the exclusive membership of this card.
"There is a revenue sharing arrangement between RBL Bank & BANKBAZAAR for this card".
**This card can be sourced through invite only.
Welcome to the Bazaar
Begin your savings journey with 5000 reward points on making first transaction with 30 days from card issuance and on paying the first year annual fee.
Everyday Rewards
Get 10x rewards points on every INR 100 spent on groceries. Maximum 1,000 reward points per month
Get 5x reward points on every INR 100 spent on fuel. Maximum 1,000 reward points per month
Get 2x rewards points* on every INR 100 spent on all other purchases
*Reward points are not accrued on the following excluded MCC/Categories Utilities, Insurance, Railways, Real Estate / Rental, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services and EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay, & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App). Additionally W.e.f. October 15, 2024, purchases made on select merchant categories: Cash, Quasi Cash, Education, Contracted Services, Miscellaneous & Bills2Pay will not be considered for base reward points accrual.
Refer list of excluded MCC/Categories as below:
Category MCC
Railways 0066, 4011, 4112
Utilities 4900
Wallet/Service Providers 6540
Quasi-Cash 6050, 6051, 4829
Real Estate/Rental 6513
Insurance 6300, 6310
Education 8220, 8244, 8249, 8211, 8241, 8299
Government Services 9400, 1490, 2490, 2995, 7800, 9406, 9222, 9405, 9399, 9211, 9402, 9401, 9311, 9223
Contracted Services 1711, 1740, 0763, 1520, 0742, 1761, 1799, 1750, 1731, 1771, 0780
Cash 6011, 6010
Miscellaneous 5960
Bills2Pay** NA
EMI NA
** Bills2Pay is a facility provided by RBL Bank where Cardmembers can pay various utility bills via RBL MyBank App/Internet banking channel
Entertainment & Indulgence
10% instant discount on BookMyShow once a month (upto INR 100)
10% Cashback on Zomato upto INR 100 in a month
On Reaching the Milestone
Get 2,000 reward points on annual spends* of INR 2 lakhs
Get 4,000 reward points on annual spends* of INR 4 lakhs
W.e.f. October 15, 2024, annual spends for Milestone rewards will not be included on purchases/spends for select Merchant Categories (MCC) including : Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous & Bills2Pay and EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay, & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App), fees (if any), charges & GST.
RBL Bank Bankbazaar SaveMax Pro Credit Card is available on MasterCard network.
*For detailed Terms and Conditions, click here
RBL Bank Bankbazaar SaveMax Pro Credit Card comes with yearly membership fees of just INR 1,499 + GST.

Product Benefits
Fees & Charges
Quick Links
A card that pays you back – literally, with Cashback
Your RBL Bank Paisabazaar Duet Credit Card brings the power of:
Cashback on your Credit Cards purchases
Credit Flexibility – Avail loan within your Credit Card Limit with Xpress Cash Facility
"There is a revenue sharing arrangement between RBL Bank & Paisabazaar.com for this card".
Product Benefits
Cashback Benefits
Enjoy 1 % cashback upto INR 500 per calendar month on Retail Outlets and Online transactions*.
Benefit will be credited to your card account within 2 weeks of purchase settlement date.
Cashback credit can be viewed in monthly credit card statement.
Fund Transfer using Xpress Cash Facility with RBL Bank
You can avail Fund Transfer using ‘Xpress Cash’ facility available on RBL MyBank Mobile App.
To enjoy benefits of Xpress Cash facility, visit RBL MyBank Mobile App & follow below steps:
Click on the banner "Get Instant Cash"
Enter details like Loan amount, tenure etc.
View EMI, Interest rate, proc fee etc.
Customer enters bank account details (A/c no. & IFSC code)
Get the amount credited within 3-4 working days
Pay Interest only on the usage & not entire amount.
Pay back in easy EMIs at your convenience.
For XpressCash Terms and Conditions, click here
For detailed Terms and Conditions, click here
RBL Bank Paisabazaar Duet Credit Card is available on MasterCard & VISA network.

RBL Bank Paisabazaar Duet Plus Credit Card
RBL Bank Paisabazaar Duet Plus Credit Card
Enjoy returns worth over 8X the annual fee
No Points. No hassle. Just Cashback.
Extra perks you’ll enjoy
*T&C Apply
Product Benefits
Fees & Charges
Quick Links
No points. Just Cashback. Lifestyle Perks. Loan Assistance.
Your RBL Bank Paisabazaar Duet Plus Credit Card brings the power of:
Cashback on your Credit Card purchases
Enjoy Movie and fuel benefits every month
Credit Flexibility – Avail loan within your Credit Card Limit with Xpress Cash Facility
"There is a revenue sharing arrangement between RBL Bank & Paisabazaar.com for this card".
Product Benefits
Welcome Benefit
Start your journey with INR 250 Cashback.
Avail the same by making a card purchase within 30 days of card issuance & paying the annual membership fee by payment due date.
Benefit will be credited to your card account within 2 weeks of purchase settlement date.
Cashback credit can be viewed in monthly credit card statement.
Cashback Benefits
Enjoy 2.5% cashback on all travel & dining transactions.
Earn 1% cashback on other eligible purchases*.
You can earn a maximum cashback of INR 500 per calendar month (Travel & Dining purchases capped at INR 200 and all other purchases capped at INR 300).
Benefit will be credited to your card account within 2 weeks of purchase settlement date.
Cashback credit can be viewed in monthly credit card statement.
Fund Transfer using Xpress Cash Facility with RBL Bank
You can avail Fund Transfer using ‘Xpress Cash’ facility available on RBL MyBank Mobile App.
To enjoy benefits of Xpress Cash facility, visit RBL MyBank Mobile App & follow below steps:
Click on the banner "Get Instant Cash"
Enter details like Loan amount, tenure etc.
View EMI, Interest rate, proc fee etc.
Customer enters bank account details (A/c no. & IFSC code)
Get the amount credited within 3-4 working days
Pay Interest only on the usage & not entire amount.
Pay back in easy EMIs at your convenience.
Movie Tickets
Avail 1+1 BookMyShow offer on tickets for weekend shows (once a billing cycle month, up to INR 200 off).
For instructions on availing the benefit, click here .
Fuel Surcharge Reversal
Surcharge reversal of up to INR 100 per month, valid on fuel transactions between INR 500 & INR 4,000.
Cumulative benefit will be reflected in your monthly credit card statement.
For XpressCash Terms and Conditions, click here .
For detailed Terms and Conditions, click here .
RBL Bank Paisabazaar Duet Plus Credit Card is available on MasterCard network.
