RBL Bank Fun+ Credit Card
While we are no longer accepting applications for RBL Bank Fun+ Credit Card, we have something more fun on offer for you! We are sure you would like our new proposition – RBL Bank Play Credit Card, designed especially for the movie buff in you. Know More
A world of delicious treats & blockbuster occasions awaits.
Get set to experience a journey into a Funtastic world like never before…
The RBL Bank Fun+ Credit Card program in association with BookMyShow is your key to a wonderland of exquisite privileges.
"There is a revenue sharing arrangement between RBL Bank & BOOKMYSHOW for this card".
Monthly Treats
Monthly food and movie vouchers, much to your delight!
On spending INR 5,000^ every month, you get to treat yourself with BookMyShow movie voucher worth INR 500
The offer will be activated on next day of start of billing cycle date after 6 PM and will remain valid till end of billing cycle. Please refer https://www.rbl.bank.in/bmsoffers for detailed steps to avail the offer.
RBL Bank Fun+ Cardmembers will not receive INR 300 Pizza Hut or KFC vouchers on monthly spends of INR 5,000 and above.
^Purchases made on select merchant categories: Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi Cash, Railways, Real Estate / Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Miscellaneous, Bills2Pay, Cash, EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App)will not be considered in the purchase value for the monthly, annual milestone & rewards benefit. Do refer to the below MCC table for more details.
Annual Blockbuster
Gatherings are super fun with rewards & benefits.
Be the most loved member in your family and friend circle by treating them with complimentary vouchers worth INR 3,000
When the annual spends on your RBL Bank Fun+ Credit Card cross INR 4 lakhs*, Get 12,000 Reward Points, redeemable for select vouchers worth INR 3,000 at https://rblrewards.rbl.bank.in/
*Purchases made on select merchant categories: Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi Cash, Railways, Real Estate / Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Miscellaneous, Bills2Pay, Cash, EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App)will not be considered in the purchase value for the monthly, annual milestone & rewards benefit. Do refer to the below MCC table for more details.
Fun times are Rewarding times
With your RBL Bank Fun+ Credit Card Rewards Membership Program, you can:
Earn 20 reward points
Earn 20 reward points INR 100 spent on dining on weekends*
Earn 10 reward points
Earn 10 reward points INR 100 spent at Pizza Hut, KFC outlets and at www.bookmyshow.com
Earn 1 reward point
Earn 1 Reward point* INR 100 on all your purchases
How to redeem: Register yourself at https://rblrewards.rbl.bank.in/ to redeem rewards for movie tickets/dining/flights/hotel bookings and much more…
*Maximum points 1,000 Reward Points in a month. One month is defined as one billing cycle.
^Purchases made on select merchant categories: Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi Cash, Railways, Real Estate / Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Miscellaneous, Bills2Pay, Cash, EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App)will not be considered in the purchase value for the monthly, annual milestone & rewards benefit. Do refer to the below MCC table for more details.

Picture abhi baaki hai…
With your RBL Bank Fun+ Credit Card, you rejoice infinite entertaining moments:
Get 10% discount on movies at BookMyShow for 15 transactions in a year, with a maximum discount of INR 100 for each transaction
How to redeem: Offer can be availed by applying for the “RBL Bank Fun+ Credit Card offer” under Avail Offers & Discounts on the bookmyshow.com checkout page/ mobile app. Click here to know more.
Waiver of Fuel surcharge
Enjoy waiver of fuel surcharge at any petrol pump in India up to INR 100 each month
Fuel surcharge waiver is applicable for transactions in the range of INR 500 to INR 4,000
RBL Bank Fun+ Credit Card is available on the MasterCard Network.
For detailed Terms and Conditions, click here
The fun and excitement does not end when you are a RBL Bank Fun+ Credit Card member, it always doubles up with:
Waiver of Annual Fee
Get your Year 2 Annual Fee of INR 499 + GST waived off on spends of INR 1.5^ Lakhs or more in the previous year
A reward redemption fee of INR 99+GST will be applicable on redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee will be levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.
^Purchases made on select merchant categories: Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi Cash, Railways, Real Estate / Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Miscellaneous, Bills2Pay, Cash, EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App)will not be considered in the purchase value for the annual fee benefit. MoCash Credit Card
We are no longer accepting applications for MoCash Credit Card.
The RBL Bank MoCash Credit Card issued by "RBL Bank Ltd" in association with "MWYN Tech Pvt Ltd (MoneyTap)" is an innovative product which combines the power of an instant loan and a Credit Card. Please go through the page to explore the benefits that are available with MoCash program.
"There is a revenue sharing arrangement between RBL Bank & MONEYTAP for this card".
RBL Bank MoCash
MoCash gives you complete flexibility to avail a line of credit within minutes. You can anytime transfer money from the MoCash app to your registered bank account and payback in easy EMIs.
What’s more, MoCash also gives you convenience of using a physical credit card for your retail and online purchases.
MoCash Credit Card Features
Welcome Benefit
2000 Reward Points on Card activation in 30 days
Rewards Benefits
1 Reward point* / INR 100 spent except fuel
2 Reward points* / INR 100 on online spends
*Base and Accelerated reward points are not accrued on fuel (9752, 5541, 5983, 5172, 5542), utilities (4900), railways (4112, 4011, 4111), rental (6513), wallet load (6540), insurance (6300, 5960) and miscellaneous categories (as specified in the Product TnCs) w.e.f. October 09, 2023.
Movie Benefits
10% discount on movie bookings at BookMyShow, 15 times in a year
Online Shopping Benefits
Get INR 1,000 shopping voucher on every INR 1 lakh spent online, a maximum of 5 times in a year
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Waiver of fuel surcharge up to INR 100 a month for fuel transactions between INR 500 and INR 4,000
MoCash Highlights
Instant Decisioning
Know your credit limit on RBL Bank MoCash app within 3 minutes
No usage No interest
Pay interest only on the amount you borrow
24/7 instant money transfer
Transfer money to your registered bank account, as you need, when you need
Pay back in easy instalments
You pay back the loan borrowed in EMIs as per the tenure you choose
You can also easily convert your Card spends into EMIs from the MoCash app
For detailed Terms and Conditions, click here
RBL Bank MoCash comes with an Annual Membership Fee of INR 500 plus taxes.
2nd year onwards Spend linked waiver on INR 1 lac spends.
With effect from August 15, 2022, a reward redemption fee of INR 99+GST will be applicable on redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee will be levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.

EasySaver Credit Card
A credit card with power of four cards in one.
Add value to all your spends with rewards like never before with EasySaver Credit Card. The card perfectly complements your spendings habits and lifestyle, letting you enjoy high-savings on all your spends like education and bill payments with best in class rewards, vouchers.
Get 1,000 RP as welcome rewards on payment of annual fee and minimum spends of INR 2,000 within 30 days of card issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards).
Key Benefits
Annual Rewards worth INR 1,500+
1 RP Per 400 Spends
8 RP per 400 Spends on Education & Bill Payment
Enjoy exclusive, never seen before features
Easy Cash: Unlimited withdrawal of your available cash limit from all ATMs in India up to your billing date (Processing fee of 2.5% applicable; min INR 500 and refer MITC for more details).
Note: Terms and Conditions apply
Shop your way to Rewards
Get 1 Reward Point for every INR 400 spends on all that you like #
Get 8 Reward Point for every INR 400 spends on Education
Get 8 Reward Point for every INR 400 spends on Bill Payment
Let’s go for a long drive
Experience the freedom and power to fill your vehicle's fuel tank at any place, at absolutely no extra cost. Get a fuel surcharge waiver of up to INR 100 per month.
The Surcharge is applicable on minimum fuel transactions of INR 500 and maximum of INR 4,000.

# Effective October 15, 2024, there are few modifications to the product Terms on your Credit Card. Transactions made on Fuel & Auto, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate, Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Bills2pay, EMI, Miscellaneous & Cash are not eligible on your EasySaver Credit Card.
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per VISA & Mastercard guidelines:
Fuel:0032,2541,4001,5542,5541,5172; Utility:4900;Insurance:6300,6310; Quas-Cash:6050,6051,4829; Railways:0066,4011,4112; Rental:6513; Education:8220,8244,8249,8211,8241,8299; Wallet:6540; Government Services:9400,1490,2490,2995,7800,9406,9222,9405,9399,9211,9402,9401,9311,9223; ContractedServices:1711,1740,0763,1520,0742,1761,1799,1750,1731,1771,0780; Cash:6011,6010; Misc:5960; Bills2Pay:Tran Code - 71,Tran Code - 72; EMI
Own your EasySaver Credit Card by paying an annual fee of INR 499 (Plus Service Tax).
Reward redemption fee of INR 99 + GST is applicable on redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee is levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.

MyFirst Credit Card
A credit card with power of four cards in one.
Add value to all your spends with rewards like never before with MyFirst Credit Card. The card perfectly complements your spendings habits and lifestyle, letting you enjoy high-savings on all your spends like education and bill payments with best in class rewards, vouchers.
Get 2,000 RP as welcome rewards on payment of annual fee and minimum spends of INR 2,000 within 30 days of card issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards).
Key Benefits
Annual Rewards worth INR 1,983+
1 RP Per 400 Spends
8 RP per 400 Spends on Education & Bill Payment
Enjoy exclusive, never seen before features
Easy Cash: Unlimited withdrawal of your available cash limit from all ATMs in India up to your billing date (Processing fee of 2.5% applicable; min INR 500 and refer MITC for more details).
Note: Terms and Conditions apply
Shop your way to Rewards
Get 1 Reward Point for every INR 400 spends on all that you like #
Get 8 Reward Point for every INR 400 spends on Education
Get 8 Reward Point for every INR 400 spends on Bill Payment
Let’s go for a long drive
Experience the freedom and power to fill your vehicle's fuel tank at any place, at absolutely no extra cost. Get a fuel surcharge waiver of up to INR 100 per month.
The Surcharge is applicable on minimum fuel transactions of INR 500 and maximum of INR 4,000.

Own your MyFirst Credit Card by paying an annual fee of INR 999 (Plus Service Tax).
Reward redemption fee of INR 99 + GST is applicable on redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee is levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.

Binge Credit Card
A credit card with power of four cards in one.
Plan your rewards and enjoy benefits on shopping, online spends and entertainment with your Binge Credit Card. The card perfectly complements your spending habits and lifestyle, letting you enjoy high-savings on all your spends like grocery, electronics, fashion, automobile etc. coupled with best-in-class milestone rewards, offers on movie tickets, online spends and discounts.
Get 4,000 Reward points on payment of annual fee and spends of INR 2,000 made within 30 days of card issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards).
Key Benefits
Offer on Movies
Rewards on all spends
Complimentary Lounge Access^
Annual Rewards worth INR 10,299+
^ Note: W.E.F July 01, 2025, we have discontinued the lounge benefits for this card.
Enjoy exclusive, never seen before features
Easy Cash: Unlimited withdrawal of your available cash limit from all ATMs in India up to your billing date (Processing fee of 2.5% applicable; min INR 500 and refer MITC for more details).
Note: Terms and Conditions apply
Shop your way to rewards
Get 1 Reward Point for every INR 100 you spend on all that you like # .
Get 12 Reward Points on all online spends, except for online purchases made (Maximum Cap: 800 Reward Points per month) # .
Let’s go for a long drive
Experience the freedom and power to fill your vehicle's fuel tank at any place, at absolutely no extra cost. Get a fuel surcharge waiver of INR 100 per month.
The Surcharge is applicable on minimum fuel transactions of INR 500 and maximum of INR 4,000.
Cinematic Rewards for the love of movies
Get 1+1 Bookmyshow offer on movie tickets (Upto INR 200) once a month on any day.
How to avail?
All Cardmembers can avail the offer by applying under the offers/discounts section on the BookMyShow checkout page. Visit https://www.rbl.bank.in/ for details. Cardmember will need to add their Card details and expiry date for availing the offer. This offer cannot be clubbed with any other offer.
A relaxing airport experience
2 Complimentary lounge access^ per year (1 per quarter).
Click here for the list of lounges and the terms and conditions of the offer. The Lounge program is offered by MasterCard/Visa.
Please note: Spends of INR 15,000* (or more) made in the preceding calendar quarter will unlock the lounge access for the subsequent quarter.
*Excluding Rental spends
^ Note: W.E.F July 01, 2025, we have discontinued the lounge benefits for this card.
HOW IT ADDS UP ?
Benefits

Welcome Gift: Get 4,000 Reward Points on spending INR 2,000 within 30 days of card issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards)
1,000^^

999
12 Reward Points per INR 100 spent on online spends # (Max 800 Reward Points per month) (excluding spends on rental/education/insurance/utility)
2,400^^

Platinum Shopgain Credit Card
A credit card with power of four cards in one.
Plan and enjoy your benefits on Utility bill payments with your Platinum Shopgain Credit Card. The card perfectly compliments your spending habits and lifestyle letting you enjoy high-savings on all your Utility spends with best in class entertainment vouchers.
Get 6,000 RP as welcome rewards on payment of annual fee and minimum spends of INR 2,000 within 30 days of card issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards).
Key Benefits
Annual Rewards worth INR 20,936+
Attractive Milestone Vouchers
1 RP Per 100 Spends #
Offers on Utility Bill Payments
Enjoy exclusive, never seen before features
Easy Cash: Unlimited withdrawal of your available cash limit from all ATMs in India up to your billing date (Processing fee of 2.5% applicable; min INR 500 and refer MITC for more details).
Note: Terms and Conditions apply
Shop your way to Rewards
25 Reward Points for every INR 100 spent on utility bill payments - up to 500 Reward Points pm
Milestone: Zomato Voucher/Amazon Prime Voucher - on spends of INR 2 Lacs Annually #
Milestone: 10,000 RP on spends of INR 3 Lacs & Above #
Milestone: Additional 10,000 RP on spends of INR 4 Lacs & Above #
1 Reward point for every INR 100 spent #
Cinematic Rewards for the love of movies
1+1 on Bookmyshow (up to 200 per month) twice a month
How to avail?
All Cardmembers can avail the offer by applying under the offers/discounts section on the BookMyShow checkout page. Visit https://www.rbl.bank.in/ for details. Cardmember will need to add their Card details and expiry date for availing the offer. This offer cannot be clubbed with any other offer.
A relaxing airport experience
4 Complimentary domestic lounge access^ (1 per quarter)
Click here for the list of lounges and the terms and conditions of the offer. The Lounge program is offered by MasterCard/Visa.
Please note: Spends of INR 15,000* (or more) made in the preceding calendar quarter will unlock the lounge access for the subsequent quarter.
*Excluding Rental spends
^ Note: W.E.F July 01, 2025, we have discontinued the lounge benefits for this card.

Platinum Bonus Credit Card
A credit card with power of four cards in one.
Get rewards and enjoy benefits on every spend you do with your Platinum Bonus Credit Card. The card perfectly complements your spending habits and lifestyle letting you enjoy high-savings on all your transactions with best in class milestone rewards and benefits.
Get 6,000 Reward Points on payment of annual fee and spends of INR 2,000 made within 30 days of issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards).
Key Benefits
Annual Rewards worth INR 2,500+
Second year Fee waiver on spend of INR 1,00,000
Enjoy exclusive, never seen before features
Easy Cash: Unlimited withdrawal of your available cash limit from all ATMs in India up to your billing date (Processing fee of 2.5% applicable; min INR 500 and refer MITC for more details).
Note: Terms and Conditions apply
Spend Based Waiver
Second year fee reversal on spends of INR 1,00,000 #
HOW IT ADDS UP ?
Benefits
Value (In INR)
Welcome Gift: 6,000 Reward Points (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards)
1,500^^
Spend Based Waiver: Spend INR 1,00,000 in a year and get waiver of Next year Annual Fee #
1,000
TOTAL BENEFITS PER ANNUM
2,500+
^^Up to
You pay an Annual Membership fee of INR 999 Plus Goods and Service tax (GST).
Note: In addition to above, Joining Bonus of 6,000 Reward Points will be credited on payment of Joining fee and on crossing spends of INR 2,000 within 30 days of card issuance.
Note: Value of 1 Reward Point will vary from INR 0.11 to INR 0.25 across different categories on rblrewards.rbl.bank.in .
For calculation purpose, we have assumed value of 1 Reward Point = INR 0.25.
# Transactions made on Education, Insurance, Utilities, Rent Payments and Wallet Load categories will not earn reward points.
# Effective from October 15, 2024, there are few modifications to the product Terms on your Credit Card. Transactions made on Fuel & Auto, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate, Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Bills2pay, EMI, Miscellaneous & Cash are not eligible on your Platinum Bonus Credit Card.
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per VISA & Mastercard guidelines:
Fuel:0032,2541,4001,5542,5541,5172; Utility:4900; Insurance:6300,6310; Quas-Cash:6050,6051,4829; Railways:0066,4011,4112; Rental:6513; Education:8220,8244,8249,8211,8241,8299; Wallet:6540; Government Services:9400,1490,2490,2995,7800,9406,9222,9405,9399,9211,9402,9401,9311,9223; ContractedServices:1711,1740,0763,1520,0742,1761,1799,1750,1731,1771,0780; Cash:6011,6010; Misc:5960; Bills2Pay:Tran Code - 71,Tran Code - 72; EMI
Own your Platinum Bonus Credit Card by paying an annual fee of INR 999 (Plus Service Tax).
Spend INR 1,00,000 in a year and get second year annual fees of INR 999 reversed.
Reward redemption fee of INR 99 + GST is applicable on redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee is levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.

Platinum Prime Credit Card
A credit card with power of four cards in one.
Plan your rewards and enjoy benefits on shopping, dining and entertainment with your Platinum Prime Credit Card. The card perfectly complements your spending habits and lifestyle, letting you enjoy high-savings on all your spends like grocery, electronics, fashion, automobile etc. coupled with best-in-class milestone rewards, offers on movie tickets, dining and discounts.
Get 4,000 Reward points on payment of annual fee and spends of INR 2,000 made within 30 days of card issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards).
Enjoy exclusive, never seen before features
EMI Finance: Shop for durables, electronics, furniture, clothes & accessories, groceries and much more. Divide all you buy into easy EMIs.
Easy Cash: Unlimited withdrawal of your available cash limit from all ATMs in India up to your billing date (Processing fee of 2.5% applicable; min INR 500 and refer MITC for more details).
Note: Terms and Conditions apply
Cinematic Rewards for the love of movies
Get 1+1 free movie ticket (Up to INR 200) on Bookmyshow, once a month, on any Wednesday.
How to avail?
All cardmembers can avail the offer by applying under the offers/discounts section on the BookMyShow checkout page. Visit www.rbl.bank.in for details. Cardmember will need to add their Card details and expiry date for availing the offer. This offer cannot be clubbed with any other offer.
Shop your way to rewards
Get 2 Reward Points for every INR 100 spent on all that you like #
Dine in Style
Avail 5% discount on your dining spends, via 20 Reward Points that you earn on every INR 100 spent on Wednesday (Maximum Rewards = 1,000 per month).
Let’s go for a long drive
Experience the freedom and power to fill your vehicle's fuel tank at any place, at absolutely no extra cost. Get a fuel surcharge waiver of up to INR 100 per month.
The Surcharge is applicable on minimum fuel transactions of INR 500 and maximum of INR 4,000.
HOW IT ADDS UP ?

# Effective November 13, 2023, transactions made on Education, Insurance, Utilities, Rent Payments and Wallet Load categories will not earn reward points.
# Effective from October 15, 2024, there are few modifications to the product Terms on your Credit Card. Transactions made on Fuel & Auto, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate, Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Bills2pay, EMI, Miscellaneous & Cash are not eligible on your Platinum Prime Credit Card.
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per VISA & Mastercard guidelines:
Fuel:0032,2541,4001,5542,5541,5172; Utility:4900; Insurance:6300,6310; Quas-Cash:6050,6051,4829; Railways:0066,4011,4112;Rental:6513; Education:8220,8244,8249,8211,8241,8299; Wallet:6540; Government Services:9400,1490,2490,2995,7800,9406,9222,9405,9399,9211,9402,9401,9311,9223; ContractedServices:1711,1740,0763,1520,0742,1761,1799,1750,1731,1771,0780; Cash:6011,6010; Misc:5960; Bills2Pay:Tran Code - 71,Tran Code - 72; EMI
Own your Platinum Prime Credit Card by paying an annual fee of INR 999 (Plus Service Tax).
Reward redemption fee of INR 99 + GST is applicable on redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee is levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.

Platinum Max Credit Card
Shop, travel, enjoy and repeat, as your Platinum Max Credit Card gives you many reasons to do so. The card perfectly complements your spending habits and lifestyle, letting you enjoy high-savings on all your spends like grocery, electronics, fashion, automobile etc. coupled with best-in-class instant monthly milestone rewards, offers on movie tickets, dining and discounts.
Get 4,000 Reward points on payment of annual fee and spends of INR 2,000 made within 30 days of card issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards).
Enjoy exclusive, never seen before features
EMI Finance: Shop for durables, electronics, furniture, clothes & accessories, groceries and much more. Divide all you buy into easy EMIs.
Easy Cash: Unlimited withdrawal of your available cash limit from all ATMs in India up to your billing date (Processing fee of 2.5% applicable; min INR 500 and refer MITC for more details).
Note: Terms and Conditions apply
Cinematic Rewards for the love of movies
Get 1+1 free movie ticket (Up to INR 200) on Bookmyshow, once a month on any Wednesday.
How to avail?
All cardmembers can avail the offer by applying under the offers/discounts section on the BookMyShow checkout page. Visit www.rbl.bank.in for details. Cardmember will need to add their Card details and expiry date for availing the offer. This offer cannot be clubbed with any other offer.
Shop your way to rewards
Get 2 Reward Points for every INR 100 spent on all that you like #
Dine in Style
Avail 5% discount on your dining spends, via 20 Reward Points that you earn on every INR 100 spent on Wednesday (Maximum Rewards = 1,000 per month).
Let’s go for a long drive
Experience the freedom and power to fill your vehicle's fuel tank at any place, at absolutely no extra cost. Get a fuel surcharge waiver of up to INR 100 per month.
The Surcharge is applicable on minimum fuel transactions of INR 500 and maximum of INR 4,000.

# Effective November 13, 2023, transactions made on Education, Insurance, Utilities, Rent Payments and Wallet Load categories will not earn reward points.
# Effective from October 15, 2024 there are few modifications to the product Terms on your Credit Card. Transactions made on Fuel & Auto, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate, Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Bills2pay, EMI, Miscellaneous & Cash are not eligible on your Platinum Max Credit Card.
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per VISA & Mastercard guidelines:
Fuel:0032,2541,4001,5542,5541,5172; Utility:4900; Insurance:6300,6310; Quas-Cash:6050,6051,4829; Railways:0066,4011,4112; Rental:6513; Education:8220,8244,8249,8211,8241,8299; Wallet:6540; Government Services:9400,1490,2490,2995,7800,9406,9222,9405,9399,9211,9402,9401,9311,9223; ContractedServices:1711,1740,0763,1520,0742,1761,1799,1750,1731,1771,0780; Cash:6011,6010; Misc:5960; Bills2Pay:Tran Code - 71,Tran Code - 72; EMI
Own your Platinum Max Credit Card by paying an annual fee of INR 999 (Plus Service Tax).
Reward redemption fee of INR 99 + GST is applicable on redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee is levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.

Platinum Classic Credit Card
A credit card with power of four cards in one.
Add value to all your spends with rewards like never before with Platinum Classic Credit Card. The card perfectly complements your spending habits and lifestyle, letting you enjoy high-savings on all your spends like grocery, electronics, fashion, automobile etc. coupled with best-in-class rewards, vouchers, and discounts.
Get 2,000 Reward points on payment of annual fee and spends of INR 2,000 made within 30 days of card issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards).
Please note: Presently we are not sourcing Platinum Classic Credit Card for new customers.
Enjoy exclusive, never seen before features
EMI Finance: Shop for durables, electronics, furniture, clothes & accessories, groceries and much more. Divide all you buy into easy EMIs.
Easy Cash: Unlimited withdrawal of your available cash limit from all ATMs in India up to your billing date (Processing fee of 2.5% applicable; min INR 500 and refer MITC for more details).
Note: Terms and Conditions apply
Shop your way to rewards
Get 1 Reward Point for every INR 100 you spend on all that you like #
Let’s go for a long drive
Experience the freedom and power to fill your vehicle's fuel tank at any place, at absolutely no extra cost. Get a fuel surcharge waiver of up to INR 100 per month.
The Surcharge is applicable on minimum fuel transactions of INR 500 and maximum of INR 4,000.
HOW IT ADDS UP?

# Effective November 13, 2023, transactions made on Education, Insurance, Utilities, Rent Payments and Wallet Load categories will not earn reward points.
# Effective from October 15, 2024 there are few modifications to the product Terms on your Credit Card. Transactions made on Fuel & Auto, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate, Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Bills2pay, EMI, Miscellaneous & Cash are not eligible on your Platinum Classic Credit Card.
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per VISA & Mastercard guidelines:
Fuel:0032,2541,4001,5542,5541,5172; Utility:4900; Insurance:6300,6310; Quas-Cash:6050,6051,4829; Railways:0066,4011,4112; Rental:6513; Education:8220,8244,8249,8211,8241,8299; Wallet:6540; Government Services:9400,1490,2490,2995,7800,9406,9222,9405,9399,9211,9402,9401,9311,9223; ContractedServices:1711,1740,0763,1520,0742,1761,1799,1750,1731,1771,0780; Cash:6011,6010; Misc:5960; Bills2Pay:Tran Code - 71,Tran Code - 72; EMI
Own your Platinum Classic Credit Card by paying an annual fee of INR 499 (Plus Service Tax).
Spend INR 50,000 in a year and get second year annual fees of INR 499 reversed.
Reward redemption fee of INR 99 + GST is applicable on redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee is levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.

World Max Credit Card
Step into the world of privileges with your World Max Credit Card. The card perfectly complements your lifestyle, letting you enjoy benefits on movie and dining, complimentary lounge access, 24*7 Concierge service coupled with best-in-class rewards on all your transactions.
To make your shopping experience memorable, your World Max Credit Card rewards your spends with a welcome gift.
Get 12,000 Reward Points on payment of annual fee and spends of INR 2,000 made within 30 days of Card issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards).
To start shopping, ensure you have the following:
4-digit PIN of your Card
Your mobile number updated with us, to get the One Time Password for your online purchases
Key Benefits
Offers on Movies and Dining
Rewards on all spends
Up to INR 30,700+ Bonus Rewards
Complimentary lounge & Concierge service
Enjoy exclusive, never seen before features
EMI Finance: Shop for durables, electronics, furniture, clothes & accessories, groceries and much more. Divide all you buy into easy EMIs.
Easy Cash: Unlimited withdrawal of your available cash limit from all ATMs in India up to your billing date (Processing fee of 2.5% applicable; min INR 500 and refer MITC for more details).
Note: Terms and Conditions apply
Cinematic Rewards for the love of movies
Get 1+1 free movie ticket (Up to INR 200) on BookMyShow, once a month on any day of the week.
How to avail?
All Cardmembers can avail the offer by applying under the offers/discounts section on the BookMyShow checkout page. Visit https://www.rbl.bank.in/ for details. Cardmember will need to add their Card details and expiry date for availing the offer. This offer cannot be clubbed with any other offer.
Shop your way to rewards
Get 2 Reward Points per INR 100 you spend on all that you like #
2X Reward Points on Online Spends #
Spend INR 25,000 once every month get 1,500 Reward Points #
Reach spends milestone of INR 40,000 and INR 50,000 and get additional 1,000 Reward Points on both occasions #
Redeem them at rblrewards.rbl.bank.in for an exciting range of gift vouchers/hotel stays/air tickets etc.
Dine in Style
Avail 5% discount on your dining spends, via 20 Reward Points that you earn for every INR 100 spent on weekends (Maximum Reward Points = 1,000 per month).
Let’s go for a long drive
Experience the freedom to fill your vehicle's fuel tank at any place, at absolutely no extra cost. Get a fuel surcharge waiver of up to INR 150 per month.
The Surcharge is applicable on minimum fuel transactions of INR 500 and maximum of INR 4,000.
A relaxing airport experience
Get 6 free* visit in a year, at domestic lounges at all major airports in India. The World Max Credit Card knows the best ways to comfort you.
*Maximum limit of 2 complimentary airport lounge access in a quarter.
Click here for the list of lounges and the terms and conditions of the offer. The Lounge program is offered by MasterCard/Visa.
Please note: Spends of INR 35,000* (or more) made in the preceding calendar quarter will unlock the lounge access for the subsequent quarter.
*Excluding Rental spends
World class concierge
To give you the best-in-class services, our dedicated Concierge Help Desk will assist you with all your bookings.
Kindly call Customer Service at 022-42320264 for:
Golf Course Referral and Reservation Assistance
Car Rental, Limousine Referral and Reservation Assistance
Hotel Referral and Reservation Assistance
Business Services
Special Events and Performance Assistance
Spa, Fitness Centers and Sports Centers Information and Referral Assistance
Dining Referral and Reservation Assistance
Flower and Gift Delivery Assistance

Reward redemption fee of INR 99 + GST is applicable on redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee is levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.

RBL Bank Popcorn Credit Card
With effect from December 20, 2025, your existing RBL BookMyShow Popcorn Credit Card will be transitioned. For complete details, please refer to the email sent on your registered mail address. If you need any further assistance, feel free to contact our customer support team.
"There is a revenue sharing arrangement between RBL Bank & BOOKMYSHOW for this card".
The Plot Thickens
Monthly Movie Tickets
Simply spend INR 5,000^ in a billing month to get 2 free movie tickets
Monthly benefit is to be used in a single transaction and applicable on booking minimum two movie tickets. Discount value will either be INR 500 (INR 250 per ticket) or value of two movie tickets, whichever is lower.
Billing month is the duration between your 2 consecutive statements. Example – for a statement date of 2nd, monthly offer will be available from 3rd to 2nd of next month.
The offer will be activated on next day of start of billing cycle date after 6 PM and will remain valid till end of billing cycle. Please refer https://www.rbl.bank.in/bmsoffers for detailed steps to avail the offer.
Happy Ending!
Weekly Cashback
Get assured cashback every week worth INR 25
Here’s how you can get it
Spend INR 2,500^ in a week, i.e., between Monday and Sunday
Scan the QR Code at the back of your Card plastic (every Tuesday onwards)
Enter your Mobile Number, last 2 digits of the Card and OTP to see your cashback
Redemption of last week’s cashback can be done by scanning QR Code every Tuesday onwards until the next Monday, i.e, link will be updated every Tuesday for cashback earned basis last week’s spends.
Redemption will be considered complete once OTP has been entered for the applicable card post entering mobile number and last 2 digits of Card number. No cashback will be credited if redemption process is not complete.
Weekly Cashback will be credited within 2 days from the redemption date.
Click here a step-by-step redemption guide of weekly benefit.
^Purchases made on select merchant categories: Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi Cash, Railways, Real Estate / Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Miscellaneous, Bills2Pay will not be considered in the purchase value for the monthly benefit and weekly cashback respectively.
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per Mastercard, VISA & RuPay guidelines:
MCC Category MCC Code/Tran Code
Fuel & Auto 0032, 2541, 4001, 5542, 5541, 5172
Utilities 4900
Insurance 6300, 6310
Quasi-Cash 6050, 6051, 4829
Railways 0066, 4011, 4112
Real Estate/Rental 6513
Education 8220, 8244, 8249, 8211, 8241, 8299
Wallets/Service Providers 6540
Government Services 9400, 1490, 2490, 2995, 7800, 9406, 9222, 9405, 9399,9211, 9402, 9401, 9311,9223
Contracted Services 1711, 1740, 0763, 1520, 0742, 1761, 1799, 1750, 1731, 1771, 0780
Cash 6011, 6010
Miscellaneous 5960
Bills2Pay** NA
EMI transactions NA
** Bills2Pay is a facility provided by RBL Bank where Cardmembers can pay various utility bills via RBL MyBank App/Internet banking channel

Platinum ValuePlus Credit Card
A credit card with power of four cards in one.
Add value to all your spends with rewards like never before with Platinum ValuePlus Credit Card. The card perfectly complements your spending habits and lifestyle, letting you enjoy high savings specially on your fuel needs coupled with best-in-class rewards, vouchers, and discounts.
Get INR 500 worth Gift Vouchers on payment of annual fee and spends of INR 2,000 made within 30 days of card issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards).
Enjoy exclusive, never seen before features
EMI Finance: Shop for durables, electronics, furniture, clothes & accessories, groceries and much more. Divide all you buy into easy EMIs*.
Easy Cash: Unlimited withdrawal of your available cash limit from all ATMs in India up to your billing date (Processing fee of 2.5% applicable; min INR 500 and refer MITC for more details).
Note: Terms and Conditions apply
* Upcoming feature
Let’s go for a long drive
Experience the freedom and power to fill your vehicle's fuel tank at any place, at absolutely no extra cost. Get a fuel surcharge waiver of up to INR 100 per month.
The Surcharge is applicable on minimum fuel transactions of INR 500 and maximum of INR 4,000.
Accelerated Rewards for you
10% Cashback^^ on Fuel Purchases (INR 250 per month).
This ^^ Redeem your cashback on rblrewards.rbl.bank.in
Please note: Cashback will be credited in form of reward points.

Platinum ShopSmart Credit Card
A credit card with power of four cards in one.
Add value to all your spends with rewards like never before with Platinum ShopSmart Credit Card. The card perfectly complements your spending habits and lifestyle, letting you enjoy high-savings specially on your grocery needs coupled with best-in-class rewards, vouchers, and discounts.
Get gift voucher worth INR 500 on payment of annual fee and spends of INR 2,000 made within 30 days of card issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards).
Key Benefits
Offer on Movies
5% Cashback^^ on Groceries
Annual Benefits worth INR 9,400+
Enjoy exclusive, never seen before features
Easy Cash: Unlimited withdrawal of your available cash limit from all ATMs in India up to your billing date (Processing fee of 2.5% applicable; min INR 500 and refer MITC for more details).
Note: Terms and Conditions apply
Shop your way to Rewards
5% Cashback^^ on all Grocery spends (up to INR 250 per month)
Second year Fee reversal for spends of INR 50,000 #
This ^^ Redeem your cashback on rblrewards.rbl.bank.in
Please note: Cashback will be credited in form of reward points.
Cinematic Rewards for the love of movies
Get 1+1 Bookmyshow offer on movie tickets (up to INR 200), on any 1 Day of the month (Any Day).
How to avail?
All Cardmembers can avail the offer by applying under the offers/discounts section on the BookMyShow checkout page. Visit https://www.rbl.bank.in/ for details. Cardmember will need to add their Card details and expiry date for availing the offer. This offer cannot be clubbed with any other offer.
A relaxing airport experience
Get 2 free visit^ in a year, at domestic lounges at all major airports in India. The Platinum ShopSmart Credit Card knows the best ways to comfort you.
* Maximum limit of 1 complimentary airport lounge access in a quarter.
Click here for the list of lounges and the terms and conditions of the offer. The Lounge program is offered by MasterCard/Visa.
Please note: Spends of INR 15,000* (or more) made in the preceding calendar quarter will unlock the lounge access for the subsequent quarter.
*Excluding Rental spends
^ Note: W.E.F July 01, 2025, we have discontinued the lounge benefits for this card.
HOW IT ADDS UP ?

You pay an Annual Membership fee of INR 499 Plus Goods and Service tax (GST).
Note: Welcome Voucher of INR 500 will only be credited on payment of Joining fee and on crossing spends of INR 2,000 within 30 days of card issuance.
Note: Redeem your cashback on rblrewards.rbl.bank.in .

Platinum TravelEasy Credit Card
A credit card with power of four cards in one.
Plan your rewards and enjoy benefits on Travel and Fuel Purchases with your Platinum TravelEasy Credit Card. The card perfectly complements your spending habits and lifestyle letting you enjoy high-savings on all your Fuel, Ola, Uber coupled with best in class milestone vouchers.
Get Gift vouchers worth INR 1,000 on payment of annual fee and spends of INR 2,000 made within 30 days of issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards).
Key Benefits
Offer on Ola/Uber Transactions
Offer on Fuel Purchases
Annual Rewards worth INR 6,800+
Enjoy exclusive, never seen before features
Easy Cash: Unlimited withdrawal of your available cash limit from all ATMs in India up to your billing date (Processing fee of 2.5% applicable; min INR 500 and refer MITC for more details).
Note: Terms and Conditions apply
Let’s go for a long drive
Experience the freedom and power to fill your vehicle's fuel tank at any place, at absolutely no extra cost. Get a fuel surcharge waiver of up to INR 100 per month.
The Surcharge is applicable on minimum fuel transactions of INR 500 and maximum of INR 4,000.
Accelerated Rewards for you
10% Cashback^^ on Fuel Purchases (INR 400 per month)
10% Cashback^^ on Ola / Uber transactions (INR 400 per month)
Second year fee reversal on spends of INR 1,00,000 #
This ^^ Redeem your cashback on rblrewards.rbl.bank.in
Please note: Cashback will be credited in form of reward points.
HOW IT ADDS UP ?
Benefits Value (In INR)
Welcome Gift: INR 1,000 worth Gift Vouchers (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards) 1,000
Spend Based Waiver: Spend INR 1,00,000 in a year and get waiver of Next year Annual Fee # 1,000
10% cash-back on Ola /Uber / Fuel Purchases (INR 400 per month) 4,800
TOTAL BENEFITS PER ANNUM 6,800+
You pay an Annual Membership fee of INR 999 Plus Goods and Service tax (GST).
Note: In addition to above, Joining Gift Voucher of INR 1,000 will be credited on payment of Joining fee and on crossing spends of INR 2,000 within 30 days of card issuance.
# Transactions made on Education, Insurance, Utilities, Rent Payments and Wallet Load categories will not earn reward points.
# Effective from October 15, 2024 there are few modifications to the product Terms on your Credit Card. Transactions made on Fuel & Auto, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate, Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Bills2pay, EMI, Miscellaneous & Cash are not eligible on your Platinum TravelEasy Credit Card.
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per VISA & Mastercard guidelines:
Fuel:0032,2541,4001,5542,5541,5172; Utility:4900; Insurance:6300,6310; Quas-Cash:6050,6051,4829; Railways:0066,4011,4112; Rental:6513; Education:8220,8244,8249,8211,8241,8299; Wallet:6540; Government Services:9400,1490,2490,2995,7800,9406,9222,9405,9399,9211,9402,9401,9311,9223; ContractedServices:1711,1740,0763,1520,0742,1761,1799,1750,1731,1771,0780; Cash:6011,6010; Misc:5960; Bills2Pay:Tran Code - 71,Tran Code - 72; EMI
Own your Platinum TravelEasy Credit Card by paying an annual fee of INR 999 (Plus Service Tax).
Spend INR 1,00,000 in a year and get second year annual fees of INR 999 reversed.

World Prime Credit Card
A credit card with power of four cards in one.
Experience privileges like never before with your World Prime Credit Card. Enjoy benefits on Movies and Online spends, get complimentary access to major domestic airport lounge and avail our 24*7 concierge service. In addition plan your spends and earn unparalleled rewards.
To make your shopping experience memorable, your World Prime Credit Card rewards your spends with a welcome gift.
Get 12,000 Reward Points on payment of annual fee and spends of INR 2,000 made within 30 days of Card issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards).
To start shopping, ensure you have the following:
4-digit PIN of your Card
Your mobile number updated with us, to get the One Time Password for your online purchases
Key Benefits
Offers on Movies
Rewards on all spends
Bonus & Annual Rewards worth INR 30,600+
Complimentary lounge & Concierge service
Enjoy exclusive, never seen before features
Easy Cash: Unlimited withdrawal of your available cash limit from all ATMs in India up to your billing date (Processing fee of 2.5% applicable; min INR 500 and refer MITC for more details).
Note: Terms and Conditions apply
Let’s go for a long drive
Experience the freedom to fill your vehicle's fuel tank at any place, at absolutely no extra cost. Get a fuel surcharge waiver of up to INR 150 per month.
The Surcharge is applicable on minimum fuel transactions of INR 500 and maximum of INR 4,000.
Shop your way to rewards
Get 2 Reward Points per INR 100 you spend #
Get 2X Reward Points on all online spends (Maximum Cap: 1,000 Reward Points) #
Spend INR 1,50,000 in a year and get 10,000 Reward Points #
Cross spend level of INR 3,50,000 in a year and get additional 10,000 Reward Points #
Redeem them at rblrewards.rbl.bank.in for an exciting range of gift vouchers/hotel stays/air tickets etc.
* This is with effect from January 01, 2022. Identification of categories is done basis Merchant Category Codes allotted by Network to the merchant where the purchase is made.
World class concierge
To give you the best-in-class services, our dedicated Concierge Help Desk will assist you with all your bookings.
Kindly call Customer Service at 022-42320264 for:
Golf Course Referral and Reservation Assistance
Car Rental, Limousine Referral and Reservation Assistance
Hotel Referral and Reservation Assistance
Business Services
Special Events and Performance Assistance
Spa, Fitness Centers and Sports Centers Information and Referral Assistance
Dining Referral and Reservation Assistance
Flower and Gift Delivery Assistance
A relaxing airport experience
Get 8 free* visit in a year, at domestic lounges at all major airports in India. The World Prime Credit Card knows the best ways to comfort you.
* Maximum limit of 2 complimentary airport lounge access in a quarter.
Click here for the list of lounges and the terms and conditions of the offer. The Lounge program is offered by MasterCard/Visa.
Please note: Spends of INR 35,000* (or more) made in the preceding calendar quarter will unlock the lounge access for the subsequent quarter.
*Excluding Rental spends
For Golf courses bookings**, please ask for the Golf Concierge Desk by calling our Customer Services at 1800 102 6263. To know the list of Golf courses, latest offers and Terms and Conditions, Click here .
**Golf Concierge complimentary only for MasterCard holders.
Cinematic Rewards for the love of movies
BookMyShow Offer: 1+1 Movie tickets (up to INR 200), twice a month on any day of the week.
How to avail?
All Cardmembers can avail the offer by applying under the offers/discounts section on the BookMyShow checkout page. Visit https://www.rbl.bank.in/ for details. Cardmember will need to add their Card details and expiry date for availing the offer. This offer cannot be clubbed with any other offer.

# Effective from October 15, 2024 there are few modifications to the product Terms on your Credit Card. Transactions made on Fuel & Auto, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate, Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Bills2pay, EMI, Miscellaneous & Cash are not eligible on your World Prime Credit Card.
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per VISA & Mastercard guidelines:
Fuel:0032,2541,4001,5542,5541,5172; Utility:4900; Insurance:6300,6310; Quas-Cash:6050,6051,4829; Railways:0066,4011,4112; Rental:6513; Education:8220,8244,8249,8211,8241,8299; Wallet:6540; Government Services:9400,1490,2490,2995,7800,9406,9222,9405,9399,9211,9402,9401,9311,9223; ContractedServices:1711,1740,0763,1520,0742,1761,1799,1750,1731,1771,0780; Cash:6011,6010; Misc:5960; Bills2Pay:Tran Code - 71,Tran Code - 72; EMI
Own your World Prime Credit Card by paying an annual fee of INR 2,999 (Plus Service Tax).
Reward redemption fee of INR 99 + GST is applicable on redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee is levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.

Platinum Plus Credit Card
A credit card with power of four cards in one.
Plan your rewards and enjoy benefits on shopping, online spends and entertainment with your Platinum Plus Credit Card. The card perfectly complements your spending habits and lifestyle, letting you enjoy high-savings on all your spends like grocery, electronics, fashion, automobile etc. coupled with best-in-class milestone rewards, offers on movie tickets, online spends and discounts.
Get 4,000 Reward points on payment of annual fee and spends of INR 2000 made within 30 days of card issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards).
Key Benefits
Offer on Movies
Rewards on all spends
Complimentary Lounge Access^
Annual benefits worth INR 9,499+
^ Note: W.E.F July 01, 2025, we have discontinued the lounge benefits for this card.
Enjoy exclusive, never seen before features
Easy Cash: Unlimited withdrawal of your available cash limit from all ATMs in India up to your billing date (Processing fee of 2.5% applicable; min INR 500 and refer MITC for more details).
Note: Terms and Conditions apply
Shop your way to rewards
Get 1 Reward Point # for every INR 100 you spend on all that you like
Get 2X Reward Points # on all online spends (Maximum Cap: 1,000 Reward Points)
Let’s go for a long drive
Experience the freedom and power to fill your vehicle's fuel tank at any place, at absolutely no extra cost. Get a fuel surcharge waiver of up to INR 100 per month.
The Surcharge is applicable on minimum fuel transactions of INR 500 and maximum of INR 4,000.
Cinematic Rewards for the love of movies
Get 1+1 Bookmyshow offer on movie tickets (up to INR 200), on any 1 Day of the month (Applicable only on Mon-Fri).
How to avail?
All Cardmembers can avail the offer by applying under the offers/discounts section on the BookMyShow checkout page. Visit https://www.rbl.bank.in/ for details. Cardmember will need to add their Card details and expiry date for availing the offer. This offer cannot be clubbed with any other offer.
A relaxing airport experience
Get 2 free visit in a year^, at domestic lounges at all major airports in India. The Platinum Plus Credit Card knows the best ways to comfort you.
* Maximum limit of 1 complimentary airport lounge access in a quarter.
Click here for the list of lounges and the terms and conditions of the offer. The Lounge program is offered by MasterCard/Visa.
Please note: Spends of INR 15,000* (or more) made in the preceding calendar quarter will unlock the lounge access for the subsequent quarter.
*Excluding Rental spends
^ Note: W.E.F July 01, 2025, we have discontinued the lounge benefits for this card.

Own your Platinum Plus Credit Card by paying an annual fee of INR 999 (Plus Service Tax).
Spend INR 1,00,000 in a year and get second year annual fees of INR 999 reversed.
Reward redemption fee of INR 99 + GST is applicable on redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee is levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.

Platinum ShopDaily Credit Card
A credit card with power of four cards in one.
Add value to all your spends with rewards like never before with Platinum ShopDaily Credit Card. The card perfectly complements your spending habits, letting you enjoy high-savings specially on your grocery needs coupled with best-in-class rewards, vouchers, and discounts.
Get Gift vouchers worth INR 500 on payment of annual fee and spends of INR 2,000 made within 30 days of issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards).
Key Benefits
Annual Rewards worth INR 4,000+
Attractive Welcome Vouchers
Spend Based Annual Fee reversal
Offer on Grocery Purchases
Enjoy exclusive, never seen before features
Easy Cash: Unlimited withdrawal of your available cash limit from all ATMs in India up to your billing date (Processing fee of 2.5% applicable; min INR 500 and refer MITC for more details).
Note: Terms and Conditions apply
Shop your way to Rewards
5% Cashback^^ on all Grocery spends (up to INR 250 per month)
Second year Fee reversal for spends of INR 50,000 #
^^ Redeem your cashback on rblrewards.rbl.bank.in
Please note: Cashback will be credited in form of reward points.

Reward Program^ 1 RP for every INR 100 spent on POS/ offline merchant 450
2 RP for every INR100 spent online 900
Milestone Benefits INR 1,000 Amazon voucher on crossing spends of INR 2.5 lac in the year 1,000
Fuel Surcharge waiver Waiver of fuel surcharge up to INR 100 a month for fuel transactions between INR 500 and INR 4,000 1,200
Movie Benefits 1+1 Free movie ticket at BookMyShow up to INR 200 every month for Weekend (Saturday/Sunday) shows 2,400
Total Annual Value 8,500+
*First swipe to be made within 30 days of card receipt and after payment of annual fee. Welcome benefit to be credited within 60 days of card receipt.

RBL Bank MoneyTap Credit Card is available on MasterCard & VISA network.
RBL Bank MoneyTap Credit Card comes with an Annual Membership fee of INR 499 plus taxes.
Annual Membership fee of INR 499 plus taxes will be applicable from first year onwards.
Fees Waiver: Spend INR 2 lakhs in a year to get your next year's fee waived off!*
A reward redemption fee of INR 99+GST will be applicable on redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee will be levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.
*W.e.f. October 15, 2024 purchases made on select categories/MCCs (refer reward points on all purchases section) will not be considered for the fee waiver benefits (as specified in product TnCs).

Platinum Edge Credit Card
A credit card with power of four cards in one.
Step into the world of delightful experiences with your Platinum Edge Credit Card. The card perfectly complements your spending habits and lifestyle, letting you enjoy high-savings on all your spends like grocery, electronics, fashion, automobile, fuel etc. coupled with best-in-class rewards, offers on movie tickets, dining, and privileges like complimentary lounge program.
To make your shopping experience memorable, your Platinum Edge Credit Card rewards your spends with a welcome gift.
Get 8,000 Reward Points on payment of annual fee and spends of INR 2,000 made within 30 days of Card issuance (No welcome rewards will be given to First Year Free cards).
To start shopping, ensure you have the following:
4-digit PIN of your Card
Your mobile number updated with us, to get the One Time Password for your online purchases
Key Benefits
Offers on Movies
Rewards on all spends
Annual Rewards worth INR 17,999+
Complimentary lounge & Concierge service
Enjoy exclusive, never seen before features
EMI Finance: Shop for durables, electronics, furniture, clothes & accessories, groceries and much more. Divide all you buy into easy EMIs.
Easy Cash: Unlimited withdrawal of your available cash limit from all ATMs in India up to your billing date (Processing fee of 2.5% applicable; min INR 500 and refer MITC for more details).
Note: Terms and Conditions apply
Monthly entertainment treats
Get 1+1 free movie ticket (Up to INR 200) on Bookmyshow, once a month.
How to avail?
All Cardmembers can avail the offer by applying under the offers/discounts section on the BookMyShow checkout page. Visit https://www.rbl.bank.in/ for details. Cardmember will need to add their Card details and expiry date for availing the offer. This offer cannot be clubbed with any other offer.
Life is rewarding, relish it completely
Get 2 Reward Points for every INR 100 spent on all that you like # (except fuel)
Get 2X Reward Points on all online spends (Maximum Cap: 1,000 Reward Points) #
Spend INR 1,50,000 in a year and get 10,000 Reward Points #
Get additional 5,000 Reward Points on spending each 1,00,000 thereafter #
Add luxury to your travel
Get 1 free visit every quarter, at domestic lounges, at all major airports in India. The Platinum Edge Credit Card knows the best ways to comfort you, so it brings all the offers right to your doorstep.
Click here for the list of lounges and the terms and conditions of the offer. The Lounge program is offered by MasterCard/Visa.
Please note: Spends of INR 35,000* (or more) made in the preceding calendar quarter will unlock the lounge access for the subsequent quarter.
*Excluding Rental spends
Fuel surcharge freedom
Experience the freedom and power to fill up your vehicle's fuel tank at any place, at absolutely no extra cost. Get a fuel surcharge waiver of up to INR 100 per month.
The Surcharge is applicable on minimum fuel transactions of INR 500 and maximum of INR 4,000.
To know more about the additional benefits, Please refer to the Benefits and Usage (BUG) Guide, sent along with your Platinum Edge Credit Card.

RBL Bank iGlobe Credit Card
RBL Bank iGlobe Credit Card is exclusively designed for NRI customers, with an annual fee of INR 3,000+ GST. Credit Card bill payment on iGlobe Credit Card is only accepted via Standing Instructions (SI) from RBL Bank NRE Savings Account through Auto-Debit facility.
Explore the benefits available on RBL Bank iGlobe Credit Card.
Welcome Benefit
Get a MakeMyTrip Voucher worth INR 3,000 as a welcome benefit.
Avail the welcome benefit in two simple steps:
Swipe and use your card within 30 days of card issuance.
Pay the annual membership fee by the payment due date.
Voucher will be sent to your registered mobile number and email address via SMS and email.
For detailed instructions on the steps to redeem your welcome gift voucher, click here .
Redeem your reward points at rblrewards.rbl.bank.in . For more details, refer to rblrewards.rbl.bank.in/tnc .
To apply for RBL Bank iGlobe Credit Card, visit your nearest branch or reach out to your Relationship Manager.
Reward Benefits
Earn 5 Reward Points for every INR 100 spent on Domestic Purchases.
Earn 10 Reward Points for every INR 100 spent on International Purchases.
Reward points earned in a given month will be credited to your account within 45 days from the purchase settlement date.
Milestone Benefits
Make purchases of INR 5 lakhs in a year and get 10,000 Reward Points.
Get additional 10,000 Reward Points on making purchases of INR 8 lakhs in a year.
Milestone benefit reward points will be credited to your account within 45 days from the date of crossing the corresponding milestone benefit.
Redeem your reward points at rblrewards.rbl.bank.in . For more details, refer to rblrewards.rbl.bank.in/tnc .
Airport Lounge Access
Get 2 complimentary visits every calendar quarter at domestic lounges at all major airports in India.
Get 6 complimentary visits every calendar year at international lounges at all major airports. Use your RBL Bank iGlobe Credit Card to access over 1,400+ international airport lounges outside India.
Click here for the list of lounges and the terms conditions of the offer. The Lounge program is offered by MasterCard/Visa.
Mark Up Fees
Spend wherever you like with the RBL Bank iGlobe Credit Card, which charges just 1.5% markup on foreign currency transactions.
24*7 Concierge Desk
Get the best services available to you around the clock from a dedicated concierge desk. You can do the following with the desk's help:
Golf Course Referral and Reservation Assistance
Hotel Referral and Reservation Assistance
Dining Referral and Reservation Assistance
Spa, Fitness Centre, and Sports Centre Information and Referral Assistance
Please contact the Concierge Desk for bookings, by calling our Customer Service at 022 6232 7777.
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Drive to places and gain more with savings on fuel spends. Enjoy waiver of fuel surcharge at any petrol pump in India.
Valid for fuel transaction between INR 500 and INR 4000. Maximum waiver of INR 250 per month.
Benefit will be reflected in your monthly credit card statement.
For detailed Terms and Conditions, click here
To apply for RBL Bank iGlobe Credit Card, visit your nearest branch or reach out to your Relationship Manager.
RBL Bank iGlobe Credit Card comes at an annual membership fees of INR 3,000 + GST.
Reward redemption fee of INR 99 + GST will be applicable on redemption of your available reward points earned on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward redemption fee will be levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.

RBL Bank DMI Finance Credit Card
Elevate your shopping experience to new heights with the RBL Bank DMI Finance Credit Card, offering an unbeatable combination of benefits, exceptional value, and rewards that will make every swipe a delight!
A delightful welcome!
The Points Parade Begins: Receive a warm welcome of 2,000 Reward Points.
Avail the welcome benefit in two simple steps: Swipe and use your card within 30 days of card issuance.
Pay the annual membership fee by the payment due date.
Welcome Benefit will be credited to your account within 60 days from the date of card issuance.
The Curtain Rises: INR 200 BookMyShow Voucher on Card Activation!
Voucher will be available within 7 days from the activation & can be directly availed on BookMyShow mobile app or website while booking movie tickets.
Redeem your reward points at rblrewards.rbl.bank.in . For more details, refer to rblrewards.rbl.bank.in/tnc .
There is a revenue sharing arrangement between RBL Bank & DMI Finance for this card.
The Ultimate Game-Changer! RBL Bank DMI Finance Credit Card boasts:
Every spend is rewarding!
Savvy shoppers earn more: 2 Reward Points per INR 100 online and 1 Reward Point per INR 100 in-store!
Avail a maximum of 500 Rewards points per billing cycle month.
Reward points earned in a given month will be credited to your account within 45 days from the purchase settlement date.
Get in-depth insights into our exclusive Rewards Program. Learn how to redeem your Reward Points for air travel, hotel stays, shopping vouchers. Visit rblrewards.rbl.bank.in . For more details, refer rblrewards.rbl.bank.in/tnc .
Milestone Marathon!
Points Galore! Shop for INR 50,000 in a quarter, Get 2,000 Reward Points
The Amazon Edge! Shop for INR 2 Lac in a year, Unlock INR 500 Amazon Voucher
Shop more, crave more: Shop for INR 3 Lac in a year, Enjoy additional INR 200 Swiggy Voucher
Reward points earned will be credited to your account/Vouchers will be delivered within 45 days from the date of crossing the mentioned threshold.
Get Ready for Blockbuster Benefits!
The Big Screen Awaits! Shop for INR 5,000* in billing cycle month, Unlock a Buy One Get One Offer worth up to INR 200 on booking movie ticket from BookMyShow
Offer will be activated on the next day of start of billing cycle & will remain valid till end of it.
For detailed instructions on availing the benefit, click here .
Surcharge Free Fueling
Drive worry-free with the RBL Bank DMI Finance Credit Card, offering a fuel surcharge waiver of up to INR 100 each month. Enjoy seamless refueling without extra costs, making every drive more economical and convenient.
Valid for fuel purchases ranging from INR 500 to INR 4,000.
Benefit will be reflected in your monthly credit card statement.
Click here to know how it adds up.
For detailed Terms and Conditions, click here
Note: Purchases made under below mentioned merchant categories will be excluded from reward point benefits, qualifying purchase value of monthly movie benefit and monthly, quarterly and annual milestone benefits: Railway, Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallets/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous, Bills2Pay and EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App).
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per Network guidelines:
Railways (4112, 4011, 0066), Fuel & Auto (0032,2541,4001,5542,5541,5172), Utilities (4900), Insurance (6300,6310), Quasi-Cash (6050, 6051, 4829), Real Estate/Rental (6513), Education (8220,8244, 8249, 8211, 8241, 8299), Wallet/Service Providers (6540), Government Services (9400,1490, 2490, 2995, 7800, 9406, 9222, 9405, 9399, 9211, 9402, 9401, 9311, 9223), Contracted Services (1711, 1740, 0763, 1520, 0742, 1761, 1799, 1750, 1731, 1771, 0780), Cash (6011, 6010), Miscellaneous (5960) and EMI
Bills2Pay is a facility provided by RBL Bank where Cardmembers can pay various utility bills via RBL MyBank App/Internet banking channel
RBL Bank DMI Finance Credit Card comes with a annual membership fee of INR 499+ GST.
Reward Redemption fee of INR 99+ GST is applicable on the redemption of your available reward points on RBL Bank Credit Cards. Reward Redemption fee will be levied one time for redemptions made in a single day.

Apply Now
Your INR 500 Ticket to INR 20,000 worth of Benefits
Discover an incredibly rewarding way to explore India with the IRCTC RBL Bank Credit Card. Loaded with benefits, it is designed to reward you back on travel bookings and ensure a seamless experience with features like Tap & Go.
A rewarding welcome
500 Reward Points up for grabs!
Simply, shop above INR 500 with your IRCTC RBL Bank Credit Card within the first 30 days of Card issuance and get rewarded.
There is a revenue sharing arrangement between RBL Bank & IRCTC for this card.
Important Note - Welcome Benefit is applicable only after annual membership fee is paid.
Cardmember will earn reward points as defined in respective product terms & conditions. However, offline UPI transactions under INR 2,000 done at small merchants on RBL Bank RuPay Credit Card will not be eligible for rewards points, voucher benefits, milestone benefits or any other product benefits, unless stated otherwise. For clarity, small merchants in this case means merchants with turnover of not more than INR 20 lakh during the previous financial year.
40X joys await you!
Level up your travel with up to 40X benefits! The Card comes at an annual fee of INR 500, and you could end up with benefits worth up to INR 20,000 annually by shopping, dining, travel bookings and more with the Card. That’s 40 times the value of your annual fee! Here's How
Rich value, just for you!
Redeem your Reward Points directly on IRCTC at incredible value.
1 Reward Point = INR 1.
To know more about train ticket booking using available reward point with zero charges, click here
Only applicable on www.irctc.co.in and mobile application.
Travel in comfort
Relax before your journeys with 8 complimentary (2 visits per quarter) lounge access at railway stations. Click here to view list of lounges.
View FAQs
Train cancelled? But journey is still on
Plan worry-free! Enjoy INR 5,000 cancellation protection in case your train is cancelled at the last minute.
To view claim process, click here
Save on transaction fees
Transaction charges of 1% up to INR 200 on train ticket booking will be reversed on IRCTC RBL Bank Credit Card. The transaction charges will be reflected in your next statement cycle (Maximum capping of transaction amount: INR 5,000).
Book train tickets, book rewards!
Earn 5 Reward Points per INR 200 spent on train ticket bookings through the IRCTC website or App.
Want to know how to earn Reward points on train journey, Click here
Even regular commutes are rewarding!
Earn 3 Reward Points per INR 200 swiped on FASTag recharge from RBL Bank Digital Channels/NCMC Reload/UTS App.
Unlock more rewards with your holiday plans!
Not just rewards on train tickets, you also earn 2 Reward Points per INR 200 spent on booking flights and hotels from the IRCTC website or App.
Get more from shopping, dining, movies…
Earn 1 Reward Point per INR 200 spent everywhere from the things you love!
For Rupay Variant only:
Tap & Transit (NCMC Credit Card)
Navigate your daily commutes effortlessly at metro and bus stations by simply tapping your card, streamlining your travel experience. To view more details, click here
View FAQs
Scan and Pay (UPI wala Credit Card)
Eliminate the hassle of handling cash and enjoy a seamless payment process by using UPI where you can simply scan and pay for a smooth transaction process. To view more details, click here
View FAQs
Share the Privilege, share the love - Add on Cards for your loved ones click here to Know more!
Please note, Add-on Credit Card Holder will be linked to the IRCTC Loyalty number of the Primary Account Holder and no separate IRCTC Loyalty Number will be created for the Ad-on Credit Card holder. All the Rewards points accrual will reflect in the Primary Credit Card holders account, which can be redeemed only by primary card holder.
Note : Purchases made under below mentioned merchant categories will be excluded from reward point benefit and quarterly milestone benefit: Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallets/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous, Bills2Pay and EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App), fees (if any), charges & GST.
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per Network guidelines:
Fuel & Auto (0032,2541,4001,5542,5541,5172), Utilities (4900), Insurance (6300,6310), Quasi-Cash (6050, 6051, 4829), Real Estate/Rental (6513), Education (8220,8244, 8249, 8211, 8241, 8299), Wallet/Service Providers (6540), Government Services (9400,1490, 2490, 2995, 7800, 9406, 9222, 9405, 9399, 9211, 9402, 9401, 9311, 9223), Contracted Services (1711, 1740, 0763, 1520, 0742, 1761, 1799, 1750, 1731, 1771, 0780), Cash (6011, 6010), Miscellaneous (5960)and EMI
Bills2Pay is a facility provided by RBL Bank where Cardmembers can pay various utility bills via RBL MyBank App/Internet banking channel
Click here for detailed terms and conditions.
To get aboard the all-India ease of transit, your IRCTC RBL Bank Credit Card comes with a Membership Fee of INR 500 + GST.

as fuel points, annually

Benefits

Apply Now
Go #Further&Beyond with India’s best Fuel Credit Card
Fuel up, worry free! Go further and beyond with IndianOil RBL Bank Credit Card. Get up to 100 litres of free petrol as fuel points annually on monthly spends of INR 20,000. Here’s How .
Road to Rewards
Get 1,000 Fuel Points on beginning the journey.
Just shop above INR 500 within 30 days of getting your card.
There is a revenue sharing arrangement between RBL Bank & IndianOil for this card.
Important Note - Welcome Benefit is applicable only after annual membership fee is paid.
Accelerate your savings! with accelerated fuel points
5% Valueback as 10 Fuel Points and 1% Fuel Surcharge waiver
XTRA Fuel Points Just For You!
Get accelerated 10 fuel points on every INR 100 spent at IndianOil fuel stations (Maximum 1,000 fuel points per month)
Keep Shopping! Keep Earning!
Get 1 fuel point on INR 100 spent on every other purchases like shopping and more!
Unlock the super value, curated just for you!
1 Fuel Point = INR 0.5
for buying XTRA Rewards points redeemable at IndianOil Fuel Stations.
Free Card, Free Petrol, Zero Worries
Spend INR 1,75,000 annually with the IndianOil RBL Bank Credit Card to waive the annual fee, turning your spending into greater savings and hassle-free rewards.
Drive, Dine, Shop and Earn!
Boost your rewards every time you spend! Earn 1 fuel point for every INR 100 spent on your favorite purchases — whether you're dining out, shopping, or indulging in everyday luxuries.
Surcharge free fueling
Drive worry-free with the IndianOil RBL Bank Credit Card, offering 1% fuel surcharge waiver of up to INR 100 each month. Enjoy seamless refueling without extra costs, making every drive more economical and convenient.
IndianOil RBL Bank Credit Card is available on MasterCard & RuPay network.
For Credit Cards issued on RuPay network, enjoy the features of National Common Mobility Card (NCMC) and RuPay Credit Card on Unified Payment Interface (UPI). Know More
Note : Purchases made under below mentioned merchant categories will be excluded from Fuel point benefit and annual fee waiver: Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallets/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous, Bills2Pay and EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App), fees (if any), charges & GST.
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per Mastercard/RuPay/VISA guidelines: Fuel & Auto (0032,2541,4001,5542,5541,5172), Utilities (4900), Insurance (6300,6310), Quasi-Cash (6050, 6051, 4829), Railways (0066, 4011, 4112), Real Estate/Rental (6513), Education (8220,8244, 8249, 8211, 8241, 8299), Wallet/Service Providers (6540), Government Services (9400,1490, 2490, 2995, 7800, 9406, 9222, 9405, 9399, 9211, 9402, 9401, 9311, 9223), Contracted Services (1711, 1740, 0763, 1520, 0742, 1761, 1799, 1750, 1731, 1771, 0780), Cash (6011, 6010), Miscellaneous (5960) and EMI
Bills2Pay is a facility provided by RBL Bank where Cardmembers can pay various utility bills via RBL MyBank App/Internet banking channel
Incase of RuPay Credit Card ,Cardmember will earn reward points as defined in respective product terms & conditions. However, offline UPI transactions under INR 2,000 done at small merchants on RBL Bank RuPay Credit Card will not be eligible for rewards points, voucher benefits, milestone benefits or any other product benefits, unless stated otherwise. For clarity, small merchants in this case means merchants with turnover of not more than INR 20 lakh during the previous financial year.
Click here for detailed terms and conditions.
Click here for list of IndianOil Fuel stations TID/MID eligible for accelerated fuel points.
Go Further & Beyond with the champion of mobility, your IndianOil RBL Bank Credit Card comes with a Membership Fee of INR 500 + GST.
Annual fee waived if you spend more than INR 1,75,000 per year.
Important note - Annual fee waiver benefit is applicable only if the annual fees is paid.

Apply Now
Go #Further&Beyond with India’s best Fuel Credit Card
Fuel up, worry free! Go further and beyond with IndianOil RBL Bank XTRA Credit Card. Get up to 250 litres of free petrol as fuel points annually on monthly spends of INR 45,000. Here’s How .
Road to Rewards
Get 3,000 Fuel Points on beginning the journey.
Just shop above INR 500 within 30 days of getting your card.
1,000 fuel points on crossing the Quarterly Milestone of INR 75,000.
There is a revenue sharing arrangement between RBL Bank & IndianOil for this card.
Important Note - Welcome Benefit is applicable only after annual membership fee is paid.
Accelerate your savings! with accelerated fuel points.
7.5% Valueback as 15 Fuel Points and 1% Fuel Surcharge waiver
XTRA Fuel Points Just For You!
Get accelerated 15 fuel points on every INR 100 spent at IndianOil fuel stations (Maximum 2,000 fuel points per month)
Keep Shopping! Keep Earning!
Get 2 fuel points on INR 100 spent on every other purchases like shopping and more!
Unlock the super value, curated just for you!
1 Fuel Point = INR 0.5
for buying Xtra Rewards points redeemable at IndianOil Fuel Stations.
Free Card, Free Petrol, Zero Worries
Spend INR 2,75,000 annually with the IndianOil RBL Bank XTRA Credit Card to waive the annual fee, turning your spending into greater savings and hassle-free rewards.
Drive, Dine, Shop and Earn!
Boost your rewards every time you spend! Earn 2 fuel points for every INR 100 spent on your favorite purchases — whether you're dining out, shopping, or indulging in everyday luxuries.
Surcharge free fueling
Drive worry-free with the IndianOil RBL Bank XTRA Credit Card, offering 1% fuel surcharge waiver of up to INR 200 each month. Enjoy seamless refueling without extra costs, making every drive more economical and convenient.
IndianOil RBL Bank XTRA Credit Card is available on MasterCard & RuPay network.
For Credit Cards issued on RuPay network, enjoy the features of National Common Mobility Card (NCMC) and RuPay Credit Card on Unified Payment Interface (UPI). Know More
Note : Purchases made under below mentioned merchant categories will be excluded from Fuel point benefit, quarterly milestone and annual fee waiver: Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallets/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous, Bills2Pay and EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App), fees (if any), charges & GST.
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per network guidelines : Utilities (4900), Insurance (6300,6310), Quasi-Cash (6050, 6051, 4829), Railways (0066, 4011, 4112), Real Estate/Rental (6513), Education (8220,8244, 8249, 8211, 8241, 8299), Wallet/Service Providers (6540), Government Services (9400,1490, 2490, 2995, 7800, 9406, 9222, 9405, 9399, 9211, 9402, 9401, 9311, 9223), Contracted Services (1711, 1740, 0763, 1520, 0742, 1761, 1799, 1750, 1731, 1771, 0780), Cash (6011, 6010), Miscellaneous (5960)and EMI
Bills2Pay is a facility provided by RBL Bank where Cardmembers can pay various utility bills via RBL MyBank App/Internet banking channel
Incase of RuPay Credit Card ,Cardmember will earn reward points as defined in respective product terms & conditions. However, offline UPI transactions under INR 2,000 done at small merchants on RBL Bank RuPay Credit Card will not be eligible for rewards points, voucher benefits, milestone benefits or any other product benefits, unless stated otherwise. For clarity, small merchants in this case means merchants with turnover of not more than INR 20 lakh during the previous financial year.
Click here for detailed terms and conditions.
Click here for list of IndianOil Fuel stations TID/MID eligible for accelerated fuel points.
Go further& Beyond with the champion of mobility, your IndianOil RBL Bank XTRA Credit Card comes with a Membership Fee of INR 1,500+ GST.
Annual fee waived if you spend more than INR 2,75,000 per year.
Important note - Annual fee waiver benefit is applicable only if the annual fees is paid.
