Why RBL Bank Patanjali Swarn Credit Card?
Health, Wealth & Entertainment; All in One Card at INR 1,499 only!
RBL Bank Patanjali Swarn Credit Card is a feature packed product with following benefits:
10% Cashback on Patanjali Online and Offline Spends
Detox with 4N/5D Free Stay
1+1 free movie ticket & INR 1,500 shopping voucher
Benefit from Fuel surcharge waiver
Enjoy movies with 1+1 discount offer on bookmyshow
Relax at domestic airport lounges during your travel
Link your Credit Card On UPI
"There is a revenue sharing arrangement between RBL Bank & Patanjali for this card".
RBL Bank Patanjali Swarn Credit Card Features:
Welcome Benefit
Earn 6,000 reward points as welcome benefit on your first spend of INR 1,000 or more, within 30 days from card issuance.
Rewards Program
Earn 1 reward point on every INR 100 spends* at online or offline stores.
Redeem points for products you love at https://rblrewards.rbl.bank.in/ .
*Reward points are not accrued on the following excluded MCC/Categories: Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Miscellaneous, Cash, Bills2Pay, EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay, & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App).
UPI transactions exclusion - No reward points will be issued for less than INR 2,000 Offline UPI transactions.
Cashback
Get 10% cashback at Patanjali online and offline stores, on transactions of INR 500 or more. Earn monthly cashback of up to INR 750. Click here to know more.
Milestone Benefit
INR 1,500 Patanjali Voucher on annual spends** of INR 3 lakh, including minimum spends of INR 12,000 at Patanjali stores/website.
4nights/5days stay at Patanjali wellness centre on annual spends** of INR 5 lakh, including minimum spends of INR 15,000 at Patanjali stores/website.
Please note that the annual milestone spend thresholds applicable to your credit card have been revised with effect from May 10, 2026.
Milestone Existing Annual Revised Annual
INR 1,500 Patanjali Voucher Total eligible annual spends of INR 3 lakh, including minimum spends of INR 12,000 at Patanjali stores/website. Total eligible annual spends of INR 9 lakh, including minimum spends of INR 1.5 lakh at Patanjali stores/website.
4 Nights / 5 Days stay at a Patanjali Wellness Centre Total eligible annual spends of INR 5 lakh, including minimum spends of INR 15,000 at Patanjali stores/website. Total eligible annual spends of INR 12 lakh, including minimum spends of INR 2.5 lakh at Patanjali stores/website.
Please note that the revised milestone criteria will be applicable to RBL Bank Patanjali Credit Cards issued on or after May 10, 2026. Cards issued on or before May 09, 2026 will continue to benefit the earlier milestone criteria until their next anniversary year.
**UPI transactions of less than INR 2,000 are excluded from accrual towards annual milestone spends.
**Annual spends for Milestone rewards will not be included on purchases/spends for select Merchant Categories (MCC) including : Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous & Bills2Pay and EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay, & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App), fees (if any), charges & GST.
Fuel Surcharge
Get 1% surcharge waiver up to INR 200 per month, on individual transactions between INR 500 to INR 4,000.
Domestic Airport Lounge Access
Get access to domestic airport lounges - 4 access per annum (once per quarter).
To be eligible for access you should have spent INR 50,000 on Patanjali credit card in previous calendar quarter.
Movie Benefits
Enjoy 1+1 offer (up to INR 200) on movie tickets at Bookmyshow on weekends/once per month.
Click here to calculate your savings.
Important Note – Welcome Benefit is applicable only after annual membership fee is paid.

Why RBL Bank Patanjali Vishisht Credit Card?
INR 6,000 Cashback at just INR 499!
RBL Bank Patanjali Vishisht Credit Card is a feature packed product with following benefits:
10% Cashback on Patanjali Online and Offline Spends
Detox with 2N/3D Free Stay
Spend 13,000 every month & pay 0 fee next year
Benefit from Fuel surcharge waiver
Link your Credit Card On UPI
"There is a revenue sharing arrangement between RBL Bank & Patanjali for this card".
RBL Bank Patanjali Vishisht Credit Card Features:
Welcome Benefit
Earn 2,000 reward points as welcome benefit on your first spend of INR 500 or more, within 30 days from card issuance.
Rewards Program
Earn 1 reward point on every INR 100 spends* at online or offline stores.
Redeem points for products you love at https://rblrewards.rbl.bank.in/ .
*Reward points are not accrued on the following excluded MCC/Categories: Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Miscellaneous, Cash, Bills2Pay, EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay, & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App).
UPI transactions exclusion - No reward points will be issued for less than INR 2,000 Offline UPI transactions.
Cashback
Get 10% cashback at Patanjali online and offline stores, on transactions of INR 500 or more. Earn monthly cashback of up to INR 500. Click here to know more.
Milestone Benefit
Annual Fee Waiver on annual spends of INR 1.5 lakh (Card fee for next year will be waived).
INR 500 Patanjali Voucher on annual spends** of INR 2.5 lakh, including minimum spends of INR 12,000 at Patanjali stores/website.
2nights/3days stay at Patanjali wellness centre on annual spends** of INR 4 lakh, including minimum spends of INR 15,000 at Patanjali stores/website.
Please note that the annual milestone spend thresholds applicable to your credit card have been revised with effect from May 10, 2026.
Milestone Existing Annual Revised Annual
INR 500 Patanjali Voucher Total eligible annual spends of INR 2.5 lakh, including minimum spends of INR 12,000 at Patanjali stores/website. Total eligible annual spends of INR 7 lakh, including minimum spends of INR 1.5 lakh at Patanjali stores/website.
2 Nights / 3 Days stay at Patanjali Wellness Centre Total eligible annual spends of INR 4 lakh, including minimum spends of INR 15,000 at Patanjali stores/website. Total annual eligible spends of INR 10 lakh, including INR 2.5 lakh at Patanjali stores/website.
Please note that the revised milestone criteria will be applicable to RBL Bank Patanjali Credit Cards issued on or after May 10, 2026. Cards issued on or before May 09, 2026 will continue to benefit the earlier milestone criteria until their next anniversary year.
**UPI transactions of less than INR 2,000 are excluded from accrual towards annual milestone spends.
**Annual spends for Milestone rewards will not be included on purchases/spends for select Merchant Categories (MCC) including : Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous & Bills2Pay and EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay, & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App), fees (if any), charges & GST.

TVS Credit RBL Bank Gold Credit Card
Your Gateway to Travel, Dining and Luxury at INR 1,500 only!
Indulge in the extraordinary with our exclusive TVS Credit RBL Bank Gold Credit Card. For those who appreciate the finer things in life, enjoy international travel perks, gourmet dinning experiences and indulgent shopping.
5% Cashback on Easydiner and Vouchers worth INR 500.
2.5% Valueback on International purchases with Free International Lounge Access.
Rewarding Start
Kickstart your journey with 6,000 Bonus Reward Points on first purchase
Avail your welcome gift by paying the annual membership fee and making a purchase within 30 days from Card issuance. Download RBL MyBank mobile App for more details.
There is a revenue sharing arrangement between RBL Bank & TVS Credit for this Card.
Important Note - Welcome Benefit is applicable only after annual membership fee is paid.
Dining Delights
Savor the finest dining experiences with 5% cashback on Eazydiner up to INR 250 every month.
Quarterly Treats
Unlock shopping or dining voucher of your choice worth INR 500 on achieving quarterly milestone of INR 50,000. Take your pick from Amazon/Flipkart/Swiggy/Zomato.
International Retreat
Venture beyond borders with the privilege of 1 complimentary international lounge visit per calendar quarter on purchases of INR 1 Lac.
For more detailed information on Priority Pass membership, refer to the standard terms and conditions here
For the full list of valid airport lounges, click here
Domestic Lounge
Enjoy 1 complimentary domestic airport lounge visit on purchases of INR 50,000 every quarter; Make it 2 complimentary visits on achieving quarterly milestone of INR 75,000.
Click here to access list of eligible lounges.
Global Benefits
Unlock a world of possibilities as you explore new horizons with 5X returns! Earn 10 Reward Points on every INR 100 spent for all your international purchases.
Everyday Extravaganza
Earn 2 Reward Points on every INR 100 spent for your favorite purchases.
Annual Milestone
Grab your Bonus 6,000 Reward Points on achieving annual milestone of INR 2.5 Lac.
Fuel Your Savings
Enjoy fuel surcharge waiver up to INR 200 per month on fuel expenses between INR 400 & INR 5,000.
Click here to calculate your savings.
Note : Purchases made under below mentioned merchant categories will be excluded from reward point benefit, quarterly and annual milestone benefit, and lounge milestone benefit : Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallets/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous, Bills2Pay and EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App), fees (if any), charges & GST.
Bills2Pay is a facility provided by RBL Bank where Cardmembers can pay various utility bills via RBL MyBank App/Internet banking channel.
Above mentioned exclusion is not applicable for international purchases.
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per Network guidelines:
Fuel & Auto (0032, 2541, 4001, 5542, 5541, 5172);Utilities (4900); Insurance (6300, 6310); Quasi-Cash (6050, 6051, 4829); Railways (0066, 4011, 4112); Real Estate/Rental (6513); Education (8220, 8244, 8249, 8211, 8241, 8299); Wallets/Service Providers (6540); Government Services (9400, 1490, 2490, 2995, 7800, 9406, 9222, 9405, 9399, 9211, 9402, 9401, 9311, 9223); Contracted Services (1711, 1740, 0763, 1520, 0742, 1761, 1799, 1750, 1731, 1771, 0780); Cash (6011, 6010); Miscellaneous (5960); Bills2Pay; EMI
Click here for detailed terms and conditions.
TVS Credit RBL Bank Gold Credit Card is available on MasterCard & RuPay network.
For Credit Cards issued on RuPay network:
Enjoy the features of National Common Mobility Card (NCMC) and RuPay Credit Card on Unified Payment Interface (UPI). Know More
Cardmember will earn reward points as defined in respective product terms & conditions. However, offline UPI transactions under INR 2,000 done at small merchants on RBL Bank RuPay Credit Card will not be eligible for rewards points, voucher benefits, milestone benefits or any other product benefits, unless stated otherwise. For clarity, small merchants in this case means merchants with turnover of not more than INR 20 lakh during the previous financial year.
Experience the ultimate prestige and luxury with TVS Credit RBL Bank Gold Credit Card at an annual membership fee of INR 1,500 + GST

TVS Credit RBL Bank Credit Card
Online Shopping with Non- Stop Rewards at INR 500 only!
Elevate your lifestyle with our exclusive TVS Credit RBL Bank Credit Card. Enjoy everyday shopping perks, movie offers, bonus rewards and much more!
Rewarding Start
Kickstart your journey with 2,000 Bonus Reward Points on first purchase
Avail your welcome gift by paying the annual membership fee and making a purchase within 30 days from Card issuance. Download RBL MyBank mobile App for more details.
There is a revenue sharing arrangement between RBL Bank & TVS Credit for this Card.
Important Note - Welcome Benefit is applicable only after annual membership fee is paid.
Monthly Movie Treats
Unlock Buy 1 Get 1 Movie ticket offer (up to INR 200 off) at BookMyShow on achieving monthly milestone of INR 10,000.
Online Perks
Unlock 2X benefit with 2 Reward Points on every INR 100 spent online (up to 1,000 Reward Points every month).
Railway Lounge Privilege
Enjoy 1 complimentary Executive Railway lounge visit every calendar quarter.
For more details & Terms and conditions, click here
For list of eligible Railway Lounges, click here
Annual Milestone
Grab your Bonus 2,000 Reward Points on achieving annual milestone of INR 1.5 Lac.
Swipe for Rewards
Earn 1 Reward Point on every INR 100 spent on your favorite in-store purchases.
Fuel Your Savings
Enjoy fuel surcharge waiver up to INR 100 per month on fuel expenses between INR 400 & INR 5,000.
Click here to calculate your savings.
Note : Purchases made under below mentioned merchant categories will be excluded from reward point benefit, and monthly and annual milestone benefit : Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallets/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous, Bills2Pay and EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App), fees (if any), charges & GST.
Bills2Pay is a facility provided by RBL Bank where Cardmembers can pay various utility bills via RBL MyBank App/Internet banking channel.
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per Network guidelines:
Fuel & Auto (0032, 2541, 4001, 5542, 5541, 5172);Utilities (4900); Insurance (6300, 6310); Quasi-Cash (6050, 6051, 4829); Railways (0066, 4011, 4112); Real Estate/Rental (6513); Education (8220, 8244, 8249, 8211, 8241, 8299); Wallets/Service Providers (6540); Government Services (9400, 1490, 2490, 2995, 7800, 9406, 9222, 9405, 9399, 9211, 9402, 9401, 9311, 9223); Contracted Services (1711, 1740, 0763, 1520, 0742, 1761, 1799, 1750, 1731, 1771, 0780); Cash (6011, 6010); Miscellaneous (5960); Bills2Pay; EMI
Click here for detailed terms and conditions.
TVS Credit RBL Bank Credit Card is available on MasterCard & RuPay network.
For Credit Cards issued on RuPay network:
Enjoy the features of National Common Mobility Card (NCMC) and RuPay Credit Card on Unified Payment Interface (UPI). Know More
Cardmember will earn reward points as defined in respective product terms & conditions. However, offline UPI transactions under INR 2,000 done at small merchants on RBL Bank RuPay Credit Card will not be eligible for rewards points, voucher benefits, milestone benefits or any other product benefits, unless stated otherwise. For clarity, small merchants in this case means merchants with turnover of not more than INR 20 lakh during the previous financial year.
Experience the ultimate convenience and flexibility with TVS Credit RBL Bank Credit Card at an annual membership fee of INR 500 + GST.

RBL Bank SalarySe UP Credit Card
Introducing the RBL Bank SalarySe UP Credit Card - a 100% virtual credit card designed to supercharge your spending. Partnering with SalarySe, this card unlocks a world of rewards with every eligible swipe, giving you more for your money. Whether you're shopping online, offline, or powering through UPI payments, the RBL Bank SalarySe UP Credit Card is your ticket to smarter spending and unbeatable rewards.
Come experience the world full of rewards!
2,500 reward points on making first transaction of INR 500 within 30 days of issuance
Additional 2,000 reward points on making 15 UPI transactions worth INR 500 each within 30 days of card issuance
Spend more.. Earn more.. You get additional 1,500 reward points on spending INR 30,000 in first 3 months of card issuance
Reward points can be redeemed at rblrewards.rbl.bank.in . For more details, refer to rblrewards.rbl.bank.in/tnc
There is a revenue sharing arrangement between RBL Bank and Critical Path Technologies Pvt Ltd (SalarySe) for this card.
RBL Bank SalarySe UP Credit Card is available only on RuPay Network.
Welcome benefits will be given only once to the customer given the eligibility criteria is met.
'RBL Bank SalarySe UP Credit Card' Highlights and Benefits:
'RBL Bank SalarySe UP Credit Card' is a 100% Virtual Credit Card issued by RBL Bank in association with Critical Path Technologies Pvt Ltd (SalarySe). Your ‘RBL Bank SalarySe UP Credit Card’ empowers you to earn rewards on every eligible spend and even better – you earn accelerated reward points up to 10X on eligible UPI spends on SalarySe’s App.
Note: This is a Virtual only card and can be accessed through RBL MyBank App . No Physical card shall be delivered to the cardmember.
Earn on every Swipe!
1 reward point* for every INR 100 spent on eligible online & offline Spends
5X reward points for every INR 100 spent on eligible UPI transactions done on SalarySe Platform (Capped at 1,000 points per month)
Accelerated 10X Reward points for every INR 100 spent on incremental UPI spends of INR 20,000 per month (Capped at 8,000 points per month)
*Refer to Product terms & conditions for more information.
It is hereby clarified that reward points cannot be accrued on below categories -

Offline UPI transactions under INR 2,000 done at small merchants on RBL Bank RuPay Credit Card will not be eligible for rewards points, voucher benefits, milestone benefits or any other product benefits, unless stated otherwise. For clarity, small merchants in this case means merchants with turnover of not more than INR 20 lakh in the previous financial year.
For detailed Terms and Conditions, click here
‘RBL Bank SalarySe UP Credit Card’ comes at an annual membership fee of just INR 499 + GST.
Fee Waiver: Spend INR 2 lakhs* in a year to get your next year’s fee waived off!
Customer will be able to redeem his/her Reward Points on SalarySe App at value of INR 0.20 Paisa per Reward Point with no reward redemption fee.
A reward redemption fee of INR 99 + GST will be applicable on redemption of your available reward points while redeeming on RBL Bank Reward portal.

RBL Bank QuickPay Credit Card
Tap, Pay, Save: Your INR 99 UPI Card is Live
No paperwork, no KYC - just tap and pay and go
Enjoy 20% cashback on your first two UPI transactions
*Available only to select existing RBL Bank Credit Cardholders.
Welcome Benefits
Product
Benefits
Fees & Charges
Quick Links
RBL QuickPay: Shop, scan, and pay anywhere
Experience the power of credit with unmatched convenience and affordability. The RBL Bank QuickPay Credit Card is your digital first companion for online and UPI based transactions.
Welcome Benefit
Enjoy 20% cashback on first 2 UPI transactions. Applicable for transaction done within 15 days of card generation. Subject to maximum capping of INR 50
Avail the welcome benefit in two simple steps: Make two UPI transactions within 15 days of card issuance.
Pay the annual membership fee by the payment due date.
Welcome benefits will be credited to your account within 60 days from the date of the card issuance.
Reward Benefits
Earn 1 reward point for every INR 200 spent.
Reward Points earned in a given month will be credited to your account within 45 days from the purchase settlement date.
Redeem your reward points at rblrewards.rbl.bank.in . For more details, refer to rblrewards.rbl.bank.in/tnc .
Key Benefits
Use your RuPay Credit Card for UPI transactions to pay bills, including utility bills, mobile recharge, and more.
Enjoy the convenience of UPI payments and earn rewards, such as cashback, reward points, or discounts. Offline UPI transactions under INR 2,000 done at small merchants will not be eligible for product benefits as mentioned in Product T&C.
Cardmember will earn reward points as defined in respective product terms & conditions. However, offline UPI transactions under INR 2000 done at small merchants on RBL Bank RuPay Credit Card will not be eligible for rewards points, voucher benefits, milestone benefits or any other product benefits, unless stated otherwise. For clarity, small merchants in this case means merchants with turnover of not more than INR 20 lakh during the previous financial year.
*Purchases made on select merchant categories: Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Wallet/Service Providers & Miscellaneous do not earn reward points.
W.e.f. October 15, 2024, purchases made on select merchant categories: Quasi-Cash, Education, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash & Bills2Pay will also not earn reward points.
# W.e.f. October 15, 2024, waiver of annual fees on achieving the annual spends will not include purchases made on select merchant categories: Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous & Bills2Pay and EMI conversion of retail transactions (Split-N-Pay & EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App), fees (if any), charges & GST.
Categories/MCCs will be defined as per Mastercard/RuPay/VISA guidelines: Grocery (5411, 5422, 5441, 5451, 5499), Fuel & Auto (0032,2541,4001,5542,5541,5172), Utilities (4900), Insurance (6300,6310), Quasi-Cash (6050, 6051, 4829), Railways (0066, 4011, 4112), Real Estate/Rental (6513), Education (8220,8244, 8249, 8211, 8241, 8299), Wallet/Service Providers (6540), Government Services (9400,1490, 2490, 2995, 7800, 9406, 9222, 9405, 9399, 9211, 9402, 9401, 9311, 9223), Contracted Services (1711, 1740, 0763, 1520, 0742, 1761, 1799, 1750, 1731, 1771, 0780), Cash (6011, 6010) and Miscellaneous (5960)
Bills2Pay is a facility provided by RBL Bank where Cardmembers can pay various utility bills via RBL MyBank App/Internet banking channel
Click here for detailed terms and conditions.
RBL Bank QuickPay Credit Card comes with an annual membership fee of INR 99 + GST.
Fee of INR 250 + GST applicable on physical card issuance, available on request.

Quick Links
Signature Banking Credit Card
Embark on the journey of Wealth Creation with Signature Banking Credit Card! This card is designed exclusively for Signature Banking customers and offers multiple benefits along with the Cashback which grows your Wealth when you Shop!
Here is How you can Earn Annual Yield of 16.6%:
Savings Interest: Customers can earn up to 6% Annual Interest on their Savings Account with your Signature Banking Relationship. Click to know more!
Fixed Deposit: Customers can earn up to 7.2% Annual Interest on their Fixed Deposit with your Signature Banking Relationship. Click to know more!
Credit Card Benefits: You can earn Annual benefits up to INR 34,500 with a value back of 5.8% & Cash value back of 2.2%. Read below to know more.
Credit Card Benefits:
Cashback that grows your Wealth
Get Unlimited 4% cashback on purchases across categories like Flights, Hotels, Shop & Vouchers on RBL Bank Rewards Portal. Click to Shop!
Enjoy 1% cashback on all eligible purchases (up to INR 1,500 per billing month)
Your cashback will be credited in your RBL Bank Savings Account.
Check Product T&C to know more on Cashback Validity & excluded categories & How to Redeem!
Milestone Benefits
Earn INR 2,000 cashback if you make eligible purchases of INR 4 lacs in a membership year.
Earn additional INR 4,000 cashback if you make eligible purchases of INR 6 lacs in a membership year.
Airport Lounge Access
Lounge Access at Airports in India
You can enjoy 2 complimentary airport lounge access within India (at major airports) every calendar quarter by swiping your Signature Banking Credit Card.
Click here to access the complete lounge list.
Lounge Access at Airports outside India
You can enjoy 2 annual complimentary airport lounge access outside India (powered by Priority Pass) by swiping your Signature Banking Credit Card.
To know the complete list of Priority Pass lounges & terms of offer, Click here .
Buy 1 Movie Ticket & Get 1 Free
Buy 1 Movie ticket & Get 1 Free on purchase of 2 or more Movie Tickets on BookMyShow every month (up to INR 250).
For more details, click here .
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Enjoy 1% fuel surcharge waiver across all fuel stations.
Valid for fuel transaction between INR 500 and INR 4,000. Get a maximum waiver of INR 250 per month.
Select Categories/MCCs (as defined by Visa/Mastercard/RuPay) which are excluded for Cashback, Milestone Benefits & Lounge Benefits –
Fuel, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous, Bills2Pay, EMI conversion of retail transactions.
(This includes converting retail transactions to EMI, Split-N-Pay, EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App)
Refer Product T&C for all exclusions.
This card comes with an Annual Membership fee of INR 2,500. The annual membership fee is waived off for Signature Banking customers.
Redemption fee not applicable on cashback redemption.
Click to know charges.

Aspire Banking Credit Card
Unlock wealth on your purchases with Aspire Banking Credit Card! This card is designed exclusively for Aspire Banking customers and offers multiple benefits along with the Cashback which grows your Wealth when you Shop!
Here is How you can Earn Annual Yield of 15.9%:
Savings Interest: Customers can earn up to 6% Annual Interest on their Savings Account with your Aspire Banking Relationship. Click to know more!
Fixed Deposit: Customers can earn up to 7.2% Annual Interest on their Fixed Deposit with your Aspire Banking Relationship. Click to know more!
Credit Card Benefits: You can earn Annual benefits up to INR 17,100 with a value back of 3.4% & Cash value back of 2.2%. Read below to know more.
Credit Card Benefits:
Cashback that grows your Savings
Get Unlimited 3% cashback on purchases made on purchases across categories like Flights, Hotels, Shop & Vouchers on RBL Bank Rewards Portal. Click to Shop!
Enjoy 1% cashback on all eligible purchases (up to INR 1,000 per billing month)
Your cashback will be credited in your RBL Bank Savings Account.
Check Product T&C to know more on Cashback Validity & excluded categories & How to Redeem!
Milestone Benefits
Earn INR 1,500 cashback if you make eligible purchases of INR 3 lacs in a membership year.
Earn additional INR 3,000 cashback if you make eligible purchases of INR 5 lacs in a membership year.
Airport Lounge Access
Lounge Access at Airports in India
Get 1 Lounge visit in India per calendar quarter (eligible purchases of INR 35,000 or more) at major airports.
Click here to check lounge list.
Buy 1 Movie Ticket & Get 1 Free
Buy 1 Movie ticket & Get 1 Free on purchase of 2 or more Movie Tickets on BookMyShow every month (up to INR 150).
For more details, click here .
Select Categories/MCCs (as defined by Visa/Mastercard/RuPay) which are excluded for Cashback, Milestone Benefits & Lounge Benefits –
Fuel, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous, Bills2Pay, EMI conversion of retail transactions.
(This includes converting retail transactions to EMI, Split-N-Pay, EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App)
Refer Product T&C for all exclusions.
This card comes with an Annual Membership fee of INR 1,500. The annual membership fee is waived off for Aspire Banking customers.
Redemption fee not applicable on cashback redemption.
Click to know charges.

LUMIÈRETM Credit Card
A WORLD ONLY A FEW WILL EVER EXPERIENCE
PIECE OF PRECISION. ETCHED FOR YOU.
Crafted from rare, finest-quality metal, the LUMIÈRE™ speaks before you do. Yet beyond the metal lies something rarer, a world few will ever enter. And with your name etched upon it, this card becomes uniquely yours.
It’s not just a card. It’s your signature in motion.
Access the Metal at INR 50,000 + GST.
EVER AT YOUR SERVICE.
Meet your Select Circle.
The Select Circle is your quiet companion on every journey, anticipating your needs, curating moments, and turning the extraordinary into the effortless.
With LUMIÈRE™, the Select Circle ensures you are always attended to, always seen, always understood, always elevated.
SPECIAL GIFT FOR YOUR SPECIAL ONES
The finest experiences are best shared with those who matter most. Some luxuries are meant to be savoured together, the joy of travel, the comfort of exclusivity, the ease of privilege.
With LUMIÈRE™, your first three add-on cards come at no cost, seamlessly extending all benefits to your loved ones.

Personal Banking
Cards
Credit Cards
NOVATM Credit Card
STEP INTO A WORLD THAT GETS YOU.
earn points worth real money.
Every purchase becomes an opportunity to indulge, turning everyday transactions into moments of reward. Earn 4 Reward Points for every INR 200 spent on purchases anywhere.
With a powerful 1 Reward Point = INR 1 redemption value, indulge in luxury handbags, unforgettable getaways, and exquisite Jewellery.
Exclusions: Fuel & Auto, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Real Estate/Rental, Wallet/Service Providers,Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous, Bills2Pay, EMI.
a rewarding start to a remarkable journey
Every journey feels different when it starts with something special.
With your NOVA™ Credit Card, you'll receive a gift card worth INR 12,500 from Taj Experiences or Luxe Gift Card.
your lounge complimentary
Your NOVA™ Credit Card opens doors to 12 complimentary airport lounges outside India and 12 complimentary airport lounges within India. Plus, enjoy 4 complimentary guest visits outside India, so your travel companions can share the experience.
every milestone deserves to be celebrated
With NOVA™, every achievement brings something special your way. Spend INR 3 lakh or more in a calendar quarter and receive a INR 10,000 Gift Card of your choice.
a swing towards something finer
Enjoy 4 golf rounds and 12 complimentary golf lessons every year, each designed to refine your technique, sharpen your strategy, and elevate the subtle art of the swing.
make every mile worth more
With NOVA™, travel becomes effortless, personal, and rewarding. Get 12 Reward Points for every INR 200 spent in flight bookings & hotel stays.
Seamlessly transfer your points to leading global airline partners, where 2 Reward Points equal 1 Partner Point, bringing the world closer than ever.
From You to Yours
Your first two add-on cards come free, letting your loved ones enjoy seamless access to rewards, travel perks, and exclusive experiences.
Because luxury isn’t just personal, it’s meant to be shared.
making every international moment worth more
Every international transaction feels effortless with NOVA™. Enjoy a lower 2% foreign transaction fee on cross-border purchases.

Apply Now
A Credit Card which grows your wealth when you Shop!
Your cashback becomes Simple, Seamless, and Transparent with your RBL Bank Apex Credit Card.
A Warm Welcome
Dine & Fly - all on us with Welcome Vouchers worth over INR 1,000. Click here to Know More!
How to Avail?
Make your first transaction within 30 days of card issuance
Pay your membership fee within the first billing cycle
A voucher redemption link will be sent to your registered email within 30 days of meeting the eligibility
Simply Cashback
Get Unlimited 2% cashback on purchases across categories like Flights, Hotels, Shop & Vouchers on RBL Bank Rewards Portal. Click to Shop!
Enjoy 1% cashback on other purchases (up to INR 500 per billing month).
Check Product T&C to know more on Cashback Validity & excluded categories & How to Redeem!
Milestone Benefits
Earn INR 1,000 cashback if you make eligible purchases of INR 2 lacs in a membership year.
Earn additional INR 2,000 cashback if you make eligible purchases of INR 4 lacs in a membership year.
Airport Lounge Access
Lounge Access at Airports in India
Get 1 Lounge visit in India per calendar quarter (eligible purchases of INR 35,000 or more) at major airports.
Click here to check lounge list.
Buy 1 Movie Ticket & Get 1 Free
Buy 1 Movie ticket & Get 1 Free on purchase of 2 or more Movie Tickets on BookMyShow every month (up to INR 100).
For more details, click here .
Select Categories/MCCs (as defined by Visa/Mastercard/RuPay) which are excluded for Cashback, Milestone Benefits & Lounge Benefits –
Fuel, Utilities, Insurance, Quasi-Cash, Railways, Real Estate/Rental, Education, Wallet/Service Providers, Government Services, Contracted Services, Cash, Miscellaneous, Bills2Pay, EMI conversion of retail transactions.
(This includes converting retail transactions to EMI, Split-N-Pay, EMI conversion requests placed at the time of making transactions at POS/Web/Mobile App)
Refer Product T&C for all exclusions.
This card comes with an annual membership fee of INR 1,000.
Redemption fee not applicable on cashback redemption.
